name: Kathy Barnette
subject: This needs to stop!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BE BETTER AMERICA PAC
body:
Something needs to change.

|
---
Fellow American,

**Let 's take a look at some tragic recent events we've seen in our country:**

* CEO of United Healthcare- killed.
* Two Israeli ambassadors' staffers- killed.
* Attempted assassinations of the President- twice.
* Doxes and attempts to murder federal ICE agents and police, all week.
* Now, a MN state rep and her husband killed AND injured a Senator and his wife.

| [ **END THE CHAOS** ](http://links.bbapac.com/u/click?_t=5784e5e40dc94351a7bcbabf677d3bf7&_m=349c2aa19f8046e98f2c74c37a1afac1&_e=-zZ5iPKD8ShL569D9-hxYBXlwUt_T2Oa7wRtJZxKFM8AlnS3UaYdwfsIx-7svq5A9DvYn9hjOyCUwtU2fQuR4f5WTf8ReC5hkFOSekgYPmPt537WaUFsD6d0vrlfZZ9cNT7kPCym8hahmHqB7LJtQVz47IhXUN712hqB0o9bFlOa0M73Jv1RJS8yJhEz5IlXbB_qVKOt5alThcz79TvCT-rVMvyFi-1h760KnPO3n3hw9BlOwrWg8puJcl1H55e8fqBQi7TVJea3k8XlPyztGLq2xcoApg99nX4gkVvH_wUjm9R1kgEz_NlGG7m7OMws_5uZEuzR162QT_32xthhKNeDOa4Saue8RlUGASjK9rs7TFBKu7wsrMgX-APEBNm4H4mb30aT7_qd0_bczDSFwpmmWyFNZ6OlXS3PaaYUUSrDZyeeX38Eb3ZRE3Mgfcm6yR1i3Pnimr4_HBXRa8VmQ4BOuTTHAHr0bFgbVYSTeQ2IFEReehnRYQNAlPCSxvkRPO3rFIX6Xoa523H9MWsSSP2EJA8KZtSk6eiLijE1tRc%3D)
---

Who do you think is to blame for all of this chaos and death? There is only one common factor to all of these events - they were all caused by the Radical Left.

Now my questions go even further. Since when do we not put people in prison for murder? How did we let the previous administration destroy us this badly? Are they even aware that they are to blame? Can the Left even understand that they are the problem?

I'm demanding answers because it's sickening.

But I'm planning something BIG, and I need your help. We cannot let another innocent person be a victim of the Radical Left's political motives.

We need to restore America after all the damage has been done. Let's end these tragic events.

[ **TAKE A STAND WITH ME ASAP** ](http://links.bbapac.com/u/click?_t=5784e5e40dc94351a7bcbabf677d3bf7&_m=349c2aa19f8046e98f2c74c37a1afac1&_e=-zZ5iPKD8ShL569D9-hxYBXlwUt_T2Oa7wRtJZxKFM8AlnS3UaYdwfsIx-7svq5A9DvYn9hjOyCUwtU2fQuR4f5WTf8ReC5hkFOSekgYPmPt537WaUFsD6d0vrlfZZ9cNT7kPCym8hahmHqB7LJtQVz47IhXUN712hqB0o9bFlNiFQEzPU9ajeso8hpfznsLeJv0TzKgLecufjDuDxB8h9aBSEfP39vAwMJ31w0rrH4jCV7oJki5xS0TQfLCYPV0LlCyZDI1E2pr3gu9HO7TjUCmLUB3GPwioR4px6Eo3hFFnwKuR7D5-X8Xqed2gIxFaIoqcDhmIWL0wYezvPNKTcRv19ACr_d7Uqur91qHr1reXS7BHJJuRYGi70FtRChukqRL3OQ_VhDOcfTV23UHbE7UD6F6FPgM1PbX1CpS8rI63W7DCuFHeqzdH_Z4nsIrFnGVlb3-7gxRfO0zk-KBIl18UJpmQQukn90_CJQ0QudDtVHdxx-hzFSOtSqlMLIIccJqZejU_dYb1Beq2K1JaY4AFQXXOYmVVJSlG4ci60M%3D)

name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: These maps say it all:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=jJCd5Vh3OwDWURT1NSHnENa3W+S56S2i8bWoyEmfsa8UTf3joO1AovxHPX7ogB0j3Y6qOcuoym8SVTPM3t9S7gG+U9lHPHrh4jm7QMs9h7M=]
Texas's new gerrymandered maps are out, Team , and boy are they bad.
You can see by the spiral around each city below -- Houston, Dallas, and San Antonio -- how vengeful partisans in Texas are trying to spread out voters and dilute groups who generally vote against them. Nothing about the way these are drawn includes fair representation.
Proposed Houston Area [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/HoustonRedistrict2025.jpg] Proposed Dallas Area [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/DallasRedistrict2025.jpg] Proposed San Antonio Area [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SanAntonioRedistrict2025.jpg]
For background: The opponents of voting rights who run Texas have opened a special "emergency session" of the state legislature to tackle another round of partisan redistricting, after having recruited the top national conservative map-drawer and a leading Washington, D.C.-based anti-voting group to ram through a new gerrymander that aims to expand the U.S. House majority.
These new maps aim to dilute the voting power of the state’s Black and brown voters, looking to follow Trump's orders to create five new MAGA-aligned congressional seats in Texas.
Voter suppression anywhere changes the balance of Congress and hurts everyone, everywhere. Help us fight back for fair maps with $25 or whatever you can today and defend our fundamental right to vote >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=jJCd5Vh3OwDWURT1NSHnENa3W+S56S2i8bWoyEmfsa8UTf3joO1AovxHPX7ogB0j3Y6qOcuoym8SVTPM3t9S7gG+U9lHPHrh4jm7QMs9h7M=]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=15.00&tknfa=DUdb0wvgHsM6gCHvVVF_ssWHyWMxiwajCZ80HdL3ClY=&contactdata=jJCd5Vh3OwDWURT1NSHnENa3W+S56S2i8bWoyEmfsa8UTf3joO1AovxHPX7ogB0j3Y6qOcuoym8SVTPM3t9S7gG+U9lHPHrh4jm7QMs9h7M=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&tknfa=DUdb0wvgHsM6gCHvVVF_ssWHyWMxiwajCZ80HdL3ClY=&contactdata=jJCd5Vh3OwDWURT1NSHnENa3W+S56S2i8bWoyEmfsa8UTf3joO1AovxHPX7ogB0j3Y6qOcuoym8SVTPM3t9S7gG+U9lHPHrh4jm7QMs9h7M=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=50.00&tknfa=DUdb0wvgHsM6gCHvVVF_ssWHyWMxiwajCZ80HdL3ClY=&contactdata=jJCd5Vh3OwDWURT1NSHnENa3W+S56S2i8bWoyEmfsa8UTf3joO1AovxHPX7ogB0j3Y6qOcuoym8SVTPM3t9S7gG+U9lHPHrh4jm7QMs9h7M=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=100.00&tknfa=DUdb0wvgHsM6gCHvVVF_ssWHyWMxiwajCZ80HdL3ClY=&contactdata=jJCd5Vh3OwDWURT1NSHnENa3W+S56S2i8bWoyEmfsa8UTf3joO1AovxHPX7ogB0j3Y6qOcuoym8SVTPM3t9S7gG+U9lHPHrh4jm7QMs9h7M=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=250.00&tknfa=DUdb0wvgHsM6gCHvVVF_ssWHyWMxiwajCZ80HdL3ClY=&contactdata=jJCd5Vh3OwDWURT1NSHnENa3W+S56S2i8bWoyEmfsa8UTf3joO1AovxHPX7ogB0j3Y6qOcuoym8SVTPM3t9S7gG+U9lHPHrh4jm7QMs9h7M=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=20.00&contactdata=jJCd5Vh3OwDWURT1NSHnENa3W+S56S2i8bWoyEmfsa8UTf3joO1AovxHPX7ogB0j3Y6qOcuoym8SVTPM3t9S7gG+U9lHPHrh4jm7QMs9h7M=]
This is all part of a sweeping national strategy that uses map-drawing to boost one party’s power at the expense of non-white voters and is now playing out at the local level.
How do we know? The D.C.-based attorney who oversaw much of these redistricting fights for a conservative law firm just took over as the top anti-voting lawyer at the MAGA version of the Justice Department.
The involvement from the start of national-level anti-voting operatives highlights the striking sophistication and coordination of this multi-pronged campaign to suppress our democracy.
This isn't some secret cabal trying to steal our power. This is happening in plain sight , with little media attention, directed from the Oval Office and being run from a party headquarters. Protecting our right to vote means stopping them.
Opponents of voting rights will stop at nothing in their pursuit of power and control. Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=jJCd5Vh3OwDWURT1NSHnENa3W+S56S2i8bWoyEmfsa8UTf3joO1AovxHPX7ogB0j3Y6qOcuoym8SVTPM3t9S7gG+U9lHPHrh4jm7QMs9h7M=]

name: John James
subject: My faith protected me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
| | | Friend, Growing up, my family were people of faith. We had faith in God, faith in our country, and faith that the best days were yet to come.

I learned that as long as I kept that faith close to my heart, I could achieve anything.

**_And when I flew as an Apache Helicopter Pilot in the U.S. Army, I leaned on my faith more than ever._** **My faith helped me remain strong in combat. It gave me the courage to lead two platoons during Operation Iraqi Freedom. **
The U.S. Army showed me the best of America - and unfortunately right now, that’s the America the Left wants to destroy.

My name is John James, and I’m running for Governor to save my state from the Democrats who are so desperate to divide us.

[**If we are going to unite our state and our nation under faith, patriotism, and American values, I need you to join me on this mission.**](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=d024e3ec91584b438bbae3c31b4996e1&_e=Gv2aVQG-by2GZ7wP-NC6gQ-tbWaLvrRO6Hiz_Zv3Yt9-8OTvkhFbe-TWRfMUcgtrMROvseWoE9W1nWcCqJ3rbGjmD-qkgFQ8HcXRjxQmL2qbc8_fFOMTWsfoQkmZp7fv-I8y4pCOZXJip-cP-9Fh-fAoMTBbSomJgvDMU-kCsZE_pjNh3U9_LnPIPiVdkWmXKjRKWwugPUg0X3J3djVlaHkwj4fFbEbl2BIT3I2Tx6GY508Dv3LbkOTwc0cMq1yV4FFN52YNb2eEnhBqAsGWXTHfnqGOHCC01F9-EWNkDkqqzZna6xO3EwWt-roKlSEPFBSdbuQmFMJyZf8zgS1-VyaL0d-AWvkcKb1Ak0yWqbcj5LFMPABREme9TBGhQbZ12mBanYAsVaqKqdRknva-8g%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | Friend, Growing up, my family were people of faith. We had faith in God, faith in our country, and faith that the best days were yet to come. I learned that as long as I kept that faith close to my heart, I could achieve anything. And when I flew as an Apache Helicopter Pilot in the U.S. Army, I leaned on my faith more than ever. My faith helped me remain strong in combat. It gave me the courage to lead two platoons during Operation Iraqi Freedom. The U.S. Army showed me the best of America - and unfortunately right now, that’s the America the Left wants to destroy. My name is John James, and I’m running for Governor to save my state from the Democrats who are so desperate to divide us. I may have hung up my flight suit, but I’m not done fighting for America, and I’m going to need a co-pilot by my side if we’re going to finish this mission. Thank you,John James Former Apache Helicopter Pilot | | Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312 | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by John James for MI Use of John James’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

body:
But let’s be clear: We cannot wait ‘til next year to put this plan into motion.
#
Peter — around this time next year, we’ll be in the thick of midterm election season. **Here’s how we’ll work to flip the Senate between now and then:**
🔵 We’ll DEFEND the Democrat-held Senate seats in states like Georgia, Michigan, Minnesota, and New Hampshire

name: Defend ICE
subject: AOC and the Squad called for DOXING ICE agents!
body:
...But Karoline Leavitt just put them in their place.

...But Karoline Leavitt just put them in their place.
| Friend,
---
There’s no question about it, far-left radicals and anti-American extremists have truly taken control of the Democrat Party...
---
Today’s Democrat leaders – a handful of socialist Senators, AOC, and the Squad – have called for the **DOXING** of the brave men and women of ICE who are simply trying to carry out their job.
---
**These radicals _knowingly_ put our law enforcement officers in harm's way. _It’s despicable_.**
---
Which is why, straight from the White House podium, Karoline Leavitt just sounded off on them!
---
**_She single-handedly ended AOC’s career when she left her SPEECHLESS with one simple statement:_**
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zs3fhnd9hq59iofcor9dvjd7f4rkgjm2n93br6jg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob5cph2bs) **“I would encourage AOC and other Democrats _to actually meet with the United States Border Patrol..._ These are honorable Americans who are just simply trying to do their job to enforce the law. They go home to their families every night, just like we all do, and they deserve respect and dignity for trying to enforce our nation's immigration laws and to remove public safety threats from our communities.”**
---
Friend, if you agree with Karoline, then we need YOU to go on record!
---
**We’re circulating a 10 MILLION-PATRIOT PETITION to __prove__ just how many American citizens proudly stand with ICE and demand these far-left radicals like AOC be _CENSURED_ for doxing our officers.**
---
[**So please, ADD YOUR NAME to the official petition right away to stand with our ICE agents. >>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z6ubrmdumj3iuu7afkpq0cdik0kib2jekqm10990_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob5cph2bs)

clean_body: ...But Karoline Leavitt just put them in their place. ...But Karoline Leavitt just put them in their place. | Friend, There’s no question about it, far-left radicals and anti-American extremists have truly taken control of the Democrat Party... Today’s Democrat leaders – a handful of socialist Senators, AOC, and the Squad – have called for the DOXING of the brave men and women of ICE who are simply trying to carry out their job. These radicals knowingly put our law enforcement officers in harm's way. It’s despicable. Which is why, straight from the White House podium, Karoline Leavitt just sounded off on them! She single-handedly ended AOC’s career when she left her SPEECHLESS with one simple statement: “I would encourage AOC and other Democrats to actually meet with the United States Border Patrol... These are honorable Americans who are just simply trying to do their job to enforce the law. They go home to their families every night, just like we all do, and they deserve respect and dignity for trying to enforce our nation's immigration laws and to remove public safety threats from our communities.” Friend, if you agree with Karoline, then we need YOU to go on record! We’re circulating a 10 MILLION-PATRIOT PETITION to prove just how many American citizens proudly stand with ICE and demand these far-left radicals like AOC be CENSURED for doxing our officers. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcp04ac0jo34jpumicid5g6c13k05mqtg8dfj7bg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob1c9h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl671hsmu0irf4sa3qli09c0s2asfmdsti53igf0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob1c9h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpr1pb0mrsl7fpdidjtn8fikepda94qmgoj1liso_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob1c9h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr5f60qg2q05tev4d1qlll89104j2kgfhpkiisp8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob1c9h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zojr4ea8jrocpg50sl1o04951jmog0hona0tkrf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob1c9h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl6m6k9t56fjmprplcf0or981od5k8k5vhb2qmvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob1c9h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbulq3eagdjqp4hp2fpsbp50hnb9grvfknqodef8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob1c9h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0sheq4nb6v2d0cpfc40ncaqk8sehuqvtjej3la0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob1c9h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zem7i0iop90vbtj2brf6p3lfo2cjei7kjv6samb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob1c9h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America

subject: Meet the Man the Elites Fear
body:
I’ve seen what they’re capable of. That FBI raid? They treated me like a terrorist, all to protect their own. The lawsuits? A flood meant to drown me. But I’m still standing because this matters—because you deserve to know how they’re gaming you.

| [****](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvjrjfgsg3o2oirh6m1msoanflnulkbcgqgp36f0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob2cph2bs)
[****](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfoiid6m94fpr6htb14ijarigv97tph7cuic04ao_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob2cph2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I founded OMG (O'Keefe Media Group) to do what the mainstream won't: expose the powerful with raw, unfiltered truth. We caught IRS officials on hidden cameras, bragging about their AI overreach--how they're building a surveillance net to track your every dollar. _The Post Millennial_ called it "chilling," and X users said it's "the kind of journalism we've been starving for." That's OMG: no fluff, just facts, straight from the source.

But this work comes at a cost. I've been jailed on trumped-up charges, had my home raided by the FBI over Ashley Biden's diary, and faced endless lawsuits from the left. Why?

Because I won't stop. I don't have a personal life--just a relentless drive to uncover corruption. I've built OMG from the ground up to fight for people like you, [**and now we need**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf3n282vsp3grqi82l9hm50640l6mbq2p8r7e938_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob2cph2bs)**[**$64,600 by June**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3g0r7i8cjmoq1snu1kvbnnon7vegu17p9u19f0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob2cph2bs)**[**to keep going. Will you join us?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqut3pll5s1fb0vb8tlv51sejlajoko8h8c3nvq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob2cph2bs)

**People call OMG a "wrecking ball" against the establishment. **

When we dropped the IRS tapes, it wasn't just a story--it was a warning shot.

Supporters say we're "rewriting the rules of journalism," while critics whine we're "too aggressive." Good. **The truth isn 't polite**.

But fighting the system takes resources--cameras, lawyers, guts--and we're running low. [**Your support keeps us in the game, digging into the shadows the elites want hidden.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4vj6d5l1257jda78cvg61vlq6poiuflas871hc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob2cph2bs)

I've seen what they're capable of. That FBI raid? They treated me like a terrorist, all to protect their own. The lawsuits? A flood meant to drown me. But I'm still standing because this matters--because you deserve to know how they're gaming you.

OMG's got more exposes ready to drop, [**but**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze16h1ad6j1bu9ntqf16trop1hn3v0lo1i7skkug_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob2cph2bs)**[**$64,600 by June**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhgpmmdcmpbnhgkvj93f7vgfgab19sbqsd1pgu3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob2cph2bs)**[**is our lifeline. Without it, we fade, and they win.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt8ras0ib4dj99sdkmo2s1ajl1rs5p4tia557ipo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob2cph2bs)

If you're sick of the lies, the cover-ups, the smug insiders laughing at us, then this is your fight too. [**Your donation today --$20, $100, whatever you can--fuels work the mainstream's too scared to touch**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2h42gb2npgr1dru2dd3t009squ2rhl8oo2qpl3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob2cph2bs).

I'm not here to play nice; I'm here to win. Thank you for considering this. **With you, we 're unstoppable.**

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: The Summer Census is closing at MIDNIGHT!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Time is ticking and things are moving fast

Friend - The summer will be over before you know it.
That's why I'm reaching out to remind you to complete our annual Summer Census. Time is running out to share your thoughts on the most important issues that matter to patriots like you. [SUBMIT YOUR CENSUS NOW
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm97libeq6gohop6jphphat0f1er4teopo082o78_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob6c3h2bs)I know this time of year can be busy, but your response is critical to defending our Majority and tackling the big-government socialist agenda of Far-Left Radicals in the House. This year is a critical year for Republicans nationwide, and we need to hear from you today to know we have your support. [SHARE YOUR RESPONSE
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4d2mjf7moq735aajak7h336n47bianddh82dr38_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob6c3h2bs)[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziiiljgrp1n1gf5e5v65pumjs5llpoqji6o7qi2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob6c3h2bs)The clock is ticking and things are moving fast.

[We're closing responses at 11:59 PM TONIGHT, and we need to hear from you!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za1o4fl6dm8tk38th6gfskg8gjoqat6dog7oit80_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi60ob6c3h2bs)
Patriots everywhere are sharing their thoughts to help House Republicans launch their campaign for a sweeping victory in 2026. Don't miss this chance to share your insights with us to make history happen. We're counting on you for the future of our great Nation. [SHARE MY RESPONSE

subject: Join Me to Save OMG from a Lawsuit Threatening Press Freedom
body:
On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, “Trump’s a sociopathic narcissist...I’m in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do” about Trump.

| [****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6t8rp563td7rh9cpbvt87ag5to5mpsojvmp5um0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi68pj6chh2bs)
[****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6ng9qi9h9qtnpst824uj62eqhhrfbc45429to4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi68pj6chh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, founder of O'Keefe Media Group (OMG), where we risk everything to expose corruption through undercover journalism.

Right now, we're facing a newly filed, **federal lawsuit that could destroy our mission and silence journalists everywhere** --[**and I need your help**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zo0lnfbi3hfumd9pk02ldkkf3i4qfvf1ip0422m0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi68pj6chh2bs).

On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, "**_Trump 's a sociopathic narcissist_** _..._ I'm in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do" about Trump.

His baseless claims--defamation, fraud, wiretapping--**are meant to bankrupt us**.

As I told the Associated Press, "This is an attack against the First Amendment... the process is the punishment."

If Mannina's defamation claim wins, **it 's over for OMG**.

Our "American Swiper" program, which drives our exposes, could spark countless lawsuits from others we've exposed, ending our work.

**We have just 21 days from being served to hire top D.C. attorneys and respond, or we risk losing by default**.

Liberty Guard is hosting our legal defense fund, and [**I 'm asking you to join our fight with a donation today.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zih4edovviofjfljqrhjhpvsjdk3pfto3dhibmlo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi68pj6chh2bs)

Please donate today to stand with OMG and save press freedom.

More than ever, I need patriots like you to help respond by this 21-day deadline and keep the OMG alive and allow us to **keep fighting corruption with the truth**.

[**Your support will defend not just OMG but the right to fearless journalism.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsorc9mso4divgrnvab2j0nnb788e1tt7121u2cg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi68pj6chh2bs)

Join The Fight Today,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. We have 21 days to act, or the powerful win. [**Donate now to protect the First Amendment.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zl3kg4kb1jvfv9s9q8bkjqn0u33npbp8u9jtsqpg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi68pj6chh2bs)

body:
My father just made an important announcement.

My father just made an important announcement.
| **_A SECURE MEMO FROM THE DESK OF DONALD TRUMP JR._**
---
Friend,
---
My father just made one of the most important announcements of his presidency!
---
**Trump calls for census of Americans ONLY, with proof of citizenship to 'bring our elections back'**
[Source: _Post Millennial_]
---
For years, the Democrats have RIGGED the census by counting ILLEGALS along with American citizens.
---
**This inflates the total population count of blue cities and states, allowing them to** _STEAL_** House seats – and votes in the electoral college – from American citizens! **
---
_Some estimates show the Democrats would immediately lose over**TEN House seats** if the census _ONLY_ counted citizens! _
---
The worst part? Unless we change the rules, the MILLIONS of illegals who flooded our country under Joe Biden will be counted in the next census!
---
That would spell the end of our country as we know it.
---
_It’s vital that we redo the census before the midterms to ensure it only counts American citizens._
---
That alone could decide which party wins the House!
---
**But Friend, before we can conduct a _NEW_ national census, we first need to ensure that our own census records are 100% complete. **
---
That’s why I’m asking _YOU_ to take just a moment to verify your census records.
---
[**Please complete the Official 2025 Trump-Voter Census survey to ensure that YOUR information is fully verified.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6r9gfr442dcd50f7ktge0dp7m6qo305j4dh7288_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi62o34cdh2bs)

Thank you,

---
Pilgrims light candles at the Shrine of Our Lady of Lourdes in France. / Credit: Courtney Mares/CNA CNA Newsroom, Jul 26, 2025 / 11:15 am (CNA). Antonia Raco, a 67-year-old Italian woman long affected by an incurable neurodegenerative illness, was officially introduced to the press on July 25 in Lourdes, where her healing was recognized as the 72nd miracle attributed to the intercession of the Virgin Mary since the apparitions of 1858. In a moment of great joy, the 72nd miracle of Lourdes Antonia Raco spoke about her miracle. name: Laura Loomer
subject: They Want Me Silent—But I’m Fighting for Trump’s America. Will You Stand With Me?
body:
The mainstream media won’t touch the stories I uncover—they’re too busy protecting the Biden swamp and their globalist puppet masters. But I don’t care who’s in my way. I dig deeper, ask harder questions, and shine a light on the rot that’s eating away at our country. And what I’ve found in recent weeks? It’s enough to make your blood boil.

| [****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zuri3v7aafdnq6kditbd1ct9p1lfq8ppqldjq6k8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi62p74c5h2bs)
[****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zarpnjros7i9g4pr42mfg2br6t07odlerbnhcl58_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi62p74c5h2bs) Dear Patriot,

My name is Laura Loomer, and I'm not your typical journalist. I don't sit in a cushy newsroom parroting talking points for the elite. I'm out there, in the trenches, exposing the corruption, betrayal, and deep-state sabotage that threatens everything President Trump has fought for--and everything we believe in. I'm a fighter, a patriot, and a relentless truth-teller. But right now, I'm writing to you [**because I can 't keep this fight alive without your help**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg1q5m1v247d8i56t07f1fvke8ievffhm57rnmc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi62p74c5h2bs).

Let me tell you why I do this. I've seen the lies, the cover-ups, and the cowardice firsthand. The mainstream media won't touch the stories I uncover--they're too busy protecting the Biden swamp and their globalist puppet masters. But I don't care who's in my way. I dig deeper, ask harder questions, and shine a light on the rot that's eating away at our country. And what I've found in recent weeks? **It 's enough to make your blood boil.**

**The Stories They Don 't Want You to Hear**

* **Summits of the Americas Turned Into a Woke Disaster**
Picture this: a gathering meant to strengthen America's position in the world, hijacked by Biden holdovers like Jennifer Showell and Thomas Hastings. These traitors are turning the Summits of the Americas into a pro-China, woke circus. I went down there myself, tracked their moves, and uncovered how they're undermining Trump's America First policies to cozy up to Communist China. They thought they could get away with it--but I'm making sure the world knows their names and their shame.

* **An Obama Loyalist Sabotaging Trump 's Iran Strategy**
Then there's Nathanael Swanson. This guy's an Obama-era relic, still slinking around the State Department's Iran negotiation team like a snake in the grass. Trump took a hard line against Iran--sanctions, strength, no compromise. But Swanson? He's working behind the scenes to unravel it all, putting our national security on the line. I've spent sleepless nights piecing together the paper trail of all Biden holdovers who remain inside the Trump admin, and I'm not stopping until they are all out of there for good.

* **Dan Goldman and the Democrat Cover-Up Machine**
Ever heard of Rep. Dan Goldman? He's a slick operator shielding violent Democrats like LaMonica McIver while orchestrating lawfare against Trump. I caught wind of this when I started digging into McIver's trail of chaos--Goldman's been running interference, protecting his own while the Democrats try to bury Trump under legal attacks. I've got the receipts, and I'm exposing their game one bombshell at a time.

* **Democrats Ignoring Pro-Hamas Violence**
Two Israeli diplomats were murdered in D.C. by a pro-Hamas terrorist. Two lives snuffed out, and what did Democrats like Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib do? Nothing. Not a word of condemnation. They're silent because they're complicit, enabling Jew hatred and Islamic terrorism while pretending to care about justice. I've been on the ground, talking to sources, documenting every disgusting detail. They can't hide from me--and I won't let them.

* **A DEI Judge Blocking Trump 's Vision**
And then there's Judge Myong J. Joun, a Biden appointee whose family rakes in cash from DEI consulting. This guy had the nerve to block Trump's order to dismantle the Department of Education--a move that would've freed our kids from woke indoctrination. I dug into his family's financial ties, and it's clear: this isn't justice, it's a paycheck. I'm fighting to get that story out there, because our children deserve better.

**Why I Need You**

These aren't just stories--they're battles. Every day, I'm taking on the deep state, the media, and the woke mob. They hate me for it. They've tried to censor me, smear me, shut me down. But I don't flinch. I don't back off. Because this isn't about me--**it 's about you, your family, and the future of America**. It's about protecting Trump's America First agenda from the cowards and traitors trying to tear it apart.

Here's the raw truth: I don't have corporate sponsors or billionaire sugar daddies bankrolling me. I'm funded by people like you--patriots who see what's at stake and refuse to let the swamp win. [**Every dollar you donate keeps me in the fight**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z28v5s8krurqep0t3ov9smq5h2udn32d44scantg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi62p74c5h2bs). It pays for my plane tickets to chase leads, my late-night research, the equipment I need to break these stories. [**Without you, I 'm grounded. Without you, the truth gets buried.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5bl22mq0j14qdh2nt66erh8gm62ocdhta7u5no8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi62p74c5h2bs)

**Stand With Me --Right Now**

[**I 'm asking you to join me.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9tj0jt3namffmpclu18jkrnuinqe4kpd237cpbo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi62p74c5h2bs) Your donation isn't just money--it's fuel for the fire I'm lighting under these corrupt elites. It's a fist in the air against the liars and sellouts. It's a promise that we won't let them silence us. **[**Donate now**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zu8sf0c5migjqrml61os6f46f8hu9sbbk809bovo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi62p74c5h2bs)**[**and let 's hit them where it hurts--right in the open, with the truth.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zuckrl477fhl0mfu1hrhkkt41meoa30jv6rhnumo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi62p74c5h2bs)

I'm not giving up. I've got more leads, more stories, more battles ahead. [**But I can 't do it alone**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2j1lnpqs5ler4vd1tgvngrmt0c8asu35ga12hdo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi62p74c5h2bs). With you by my side, we can expose every single one of these rats and defend the America we love. [**Will you stand with me?**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7ufs8421pebfmhj98eee7i5pb30df0en15h5ugo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi62p74c5h2bs)

With Vigilance,
Laura Loomer

---

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: A brand-new census!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
My father just made an important announcement.

My father just made an important announcement.
| **_A SECURE MEMO FROM THE DESK OF DONALD TRUMP JR._**
---
Friend,
---
My father just made one of the most important announcements of his presidency!
---
**Trump calls for census of Americans ONLY, with proof of citizenship to 'bring our elections back'**
[Source: _Post Millennial_]
---
For years, the Democrats have RIGGED the census by counting ILLEGALS along with American citizens.
---
**This inflates the total population count of blue cities and states, allowing them to** _STEAL_** House seats – and votes in the electoral college – from American citizens! **
---
_Some estimates show the Democrats would immediately lose over**TEN House seats** if the census _ONLY_ counted citizens! _
---
The worst part? Unless we change the rules, the MILLIONS of illegals who flooded our country under Joe Biden will be counted in the next census!
---
That would spell the end of our country as we know it.
---
_It’s vital that we redo the census before the midterms to ensure it only counts American citizens._
---
That alone could decide which party wins the House!
---
**But Friend, before we can conduct a _NEW_ national census, we first need to ensure that our own census records are 100% complete. **
---
That’s why I’m asking _YOU_ to take just a moment to verify your census records.
---
[**Please complete the Official 2025 Trump-Voter Census survey to ensure that YOUR information is fully verified.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6k2vfjp6ae4cikp2o2v8e2dbg4f0n4eiahv0ckg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi6eor6c9h2bs)
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5cnkm9vrghgp832sm7smif638hgtctv19gm0v3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi6eor6c9h2bs)
---

[TAKE THE CENSUS >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zas967rn040nu50b4ovd6lhprjikrhmmbea6nra8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cdi6eor6c9h2bs)
---

Thank you,
---

---
Donald Trump Jr.

Unless we change the rules, the MILLIONS of illegals who flooded our country under Joe Biden will be counted in the next census! That would spell the end of our country as we know it. It’s vital that we redo the census before the midterms to ensure it only counts American citizens. That alone could decide which party wins the House! But Friend, before we can conduct a NEW national census, we first need to ensure that our own census records are 100% complete. That’s why I’m asking YOU to take just a moment to verify your census records. Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1861, [Gen. George B. McClellan](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OozAQAJ_GdEbr5WeTwsU1dLn2SmTsBTZnMMJOUN7-lHuFrx5pRpo_j_HhJMq-_HYb2zKncecrRy6Fz7Gcr-14S5aSX3-PlLNMkU-e3IiAnQbSSGNwEj9jWwU7MyM3FVtDXdMbIEPVatEzwb1rPFI_9Y3pIDQthNaHuwcmqsR-bUBIBqAzXX2_AQbTTDc_ty0zqBY4SEln_Uyyl5Xn-ElvPmuftiratZQjq-aXwkHhcF1X7SaP9KUKhyCLFBd1OmWR3cWscHi-4kcjaXPrjXbar25fWKdZ-7Rtbg8Kh-q04bgkRsk9qRaWzUn8Hyw_uvS2-C8AAP__gvZ63Q) was named commander of the U.S. Army of the Potomac, replacing Gen. Irvin McDowell. After a series of clashes with President Lincoln, he was removed from command in November 1862, following the Battle of Antietam. See why President Trump is floating [the idea of rebate checks](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OwyAUhE-DO1vwjIMpKLZxl223tMA8Yjb4R_BiK7dfOVfYbqSRZuabn_t4tzHF9fFtFzQUtnHFsyQkwjxSfi37EUuk8nruWynRJczo7AgcupqrGtTobUzvUVbeBETAtkIjVNfeBFdCVbPBWw8YgtDCCdVr3TmBoKTUWmplva-iudK4AiU470TX6J6DF63rpyAlImeSo4-05eZ3iyvNGNJ7OzA307ZUycxEe2HtF4OBwXCeZzO5clFcPoPhkgyGD0x9rSespxmnZ6nJ5hhCnfHA9YW1R0cMhiobv58xpVhuikn-WGxMnzL610OHgb8AAAD__9gie90) for U.S. taxpayers in today’s _Finance_ section. Who doesn’t love earning a few bucks—especially on gas and groceries? [Upside](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOqzAQgOHTQAcaj-0MFC5eky6v3RKBPU4mMTELThC3X2WvsPUvfcX_dRkuoyR5Xv-PM7sS8_DkfUtcCq9DWV_z8pZNyvZ6LHnbZEq88jQOCGgboAZpCKOkYzB1cJEZWdfsFFl9UkCK6ptjE41GG8iDNZo4nqYx2t6DV0gQu1rcRwNCUgBW2bbvAIPSU-ejMcxQGeAgJa_tPcuz3DimI795bX2e6-RupSyV_lfhucLzvu_tPeTv7I9PrvDsk_hHo0BpZQzqRpHCvu9Mvbqw7JKSbCeqDFznUdIvWf704e3wJwAA__-hhG9z) is a [**new partner**](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOqzAQgOHTQAcaj-0MFC5eky6v3RKBPU4mMTELThC3X2WvsPUvfcX_dRkuoyR5Xv-PM7sS8_DkfUtcCq9DWV_z8pZNyvZ6LHnbZEq88jQOCGgboAZpCKOkYzB1cJEZWdfsFFl9UkCK6ptjE41GG8iDNZo4nqYx2t6DV0gQu1rcRwNCUgBW2bbvAIPSU-ejMcxQGeAgJa_tPcuz3DimI795bX2e6-RupSyV_lfhucLzvu_tPeTv7I9PrvDsk_hHo0BpZQzqRpHCvu9Mvbqw7JKSbCeqDFznUdIvWf704e3wJwAA__-hhG9z) we’re excited about, and many of us at The Flyover have already downloaded the app. It’s free, easy to use, and the earnings add up fast. Definitely worth checking out.
|
---
## Trump Visits Scotland for Trade Talks and Golf
[President Trump is visiting Scotland](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQRp_GdEb-wWtu4WKjiCLSTZMiJTJ4uDtZYyOPAe3bR-wr3PpoRt85fz_HT48R09dvv4KrSx4TnBShVihjLfu6HUhYaX9umQinCAUmPyqhDBeWKzsGj_E1dk1wC4AC3YCT1uibFFba5uE-emWNElpIO92UMXKGHqAXeglGz5Nu0F3fhFVWCmGkaT96oYLUUz8vXQcgWCcgYM2l_Zcx1Qcs8ZUPKO2c1ya6R60bMX1namBqOM-zXSldjKkBEt-JqeGSumAuMTA1YOIbznUvQHwrQBggVf7W5b4UPIA4Jk5zrtGn68IXfr_LX88ViOkhzxiY_vnj6gYn_YGyNcWF7cQYkW6WdeJr9RjfC-u3sh5O_Q8AAP__ht6N3g) from July 25-29 for a mix of diplomatic meetings and personal business, including trade talks with EU, U.K., and Scottish leaders and events at his golf resorts in Turnberry and Aberdeen. Trump will meet with U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer in Aberdeen to discuss a potential trade agreement. [He will also hold talks with](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM2OrCAQhZ8GdxjAH3TB4m7c9d3O0iAUbc2gGCjb9NtP7FeY3ZdU5cs55-sxPyxG3J__7QaGQpp3uEoEIsgz5XM7XliQyvlzpFJwiZBhsbMSquNCc6VnbzG-57byJgAoaCowUndNL4WWulqNHJzvLegwjlKIQS6iCd6OYwjd2DW9rdDcNqGVlkJ0sqvHQSgvm2VwoW0BBGsFeKSU6--EO60Q4ju9INcubVU0K9FRWPOPqYmp6bqu2u2Lu49MTbeaqUnom3umJji5WxECp8Q3AOKfkhx3XlyiaHd_83GW9f4o4M4M3PKzcMrWA_dgY73SFqts_HFhjFh6zVrx3CzGTyT6044vo34DAAD__7Oxh0k) European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen and Scottish First Minister John Swinney, with energy and tariffs expected to be on the agenda. Security measures include [road closures, checkpoints, drone bans](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOnDAUhE9jOiPzMHi3cLENRaQ_XZQS2fAMTozN2o9Fe_uIzRH-aooZjeab31_jl_HBx-Wn2VCTS2PEswQkwjxSPrb95YuncvzdUyneBsxozQgCOi4UBzXOxof3KKtZO0TAtkLdqK7tG6EaVa3adXfpJmx7OUnjrOwnNVuw9u5uM0hnKq-vNqFANUJ0TVffbwLmprW3yUmJKJgUOHtKuf6TfKQVXXinF-Z6SlsV9Eq0F9Y-GAwMhvM8663Ey2MwYOT7ymC4oBgMiVbMDIaC05E9vXnaMRvyKXKXMv_wclO49csltCI3OZu44IaRyv_Qivx5IEZeuDsiZhMYDCbzx6P50T1_qSrreT99CL70ikmxbMaHz1b61sEvDf8CAAD__yrEkvk), and increased surveillance around Trump’s properties and meeting sites. Protests are underway in Edinburgh, Aberdeen, and Glasgow.
## Maxwell Names 100 in DOJ Talks
Ghislaine Maxwell was [granted limited immunity by the Justice Department](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O5CAQhU-Ds2oV-AdPQLCJs9l0Q4seiu7qwYCAtte3X3mvMNknlfTVe-_P5_ppOXB8_LYbmebTGumogVqjsrby3vLOlVt9f-dUK98DFbrbVaEaATUovTrL4VyHzhlPpKjvyEg99pNELXX3NK6Xs1Uf5HHCyc92Ur33OM-jk6T6cezYXDbUSkvEUY63jxmVk_19_vLDQIRiQHLcUrm9Esf2JB_OtFO5faWtC-bZWq6i_yXUItQSz5xqu05CLZdYqAX1xRe9K1z9hFoeT67BciTY7N-DQoCH3QlcegFHn8De07uBRATH3lOh2CBTyoEgcPwmBy3Bi7wvdALl2ogjBHucVKDa83rRFePywSFwnbQY8LFZDv9Dtx8tvRv1LwAA__8v4pOB) during two days of interviews about her ties to Jeffrey Epstein, her lawyer confirmed. Speaking with Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche, Maxwell reportedly [named around 100 people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6yAUhJ8Gd1gY_xAXFLdxl9tuaWE4jk8WgwUnZvP2K-cVthtppNF839d9vhv0GB7_zQ6a1jgHKNkDEaSZ0ms_TsxI-fV9xJxx8ZBgMbMUsudCcalmZ9C_565yegWQ0FagG9W3QyNUo6pNL64deimMtabt184qYxQM46DGrl3HcahQX2tCSdUI0Td9Pd6EdE273OzadQCCdQIcUkz1M2KgDVb_jiek2sa98nojOjJr_zE5MTmVUmq75Ivi6pmcrsjk9Ngwe4MB-G5-CnjPMRCkE6Hw5ysTWuAODpNoh0D8w84Pk1wMTE5V0u4o6D3mQbFOPHaD_nOA_mTt1PI3AAD__74khJs) connected to Epstein’s criminal network. Her lawyer emphasized that the immunity only applies if she tells the truth and denied that any deal was requested in return. President Trump, asked about a potential pardon while in Scotland, said he “hadn’t thought about it” and distanced himself from the DOJ’s decision.
## Southwest Jet Drops to Avoid Collision
A Southwest flight dropped 475 feet Friday, about six minutes after takeoff from Burbank, [to avoid a midair collision](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDtutDAUhVdjOiM_ADOFi1_6RTdpoiglMvgCNzEY2RdG7D4iW0h9Hjrn-3z2T4cBt_nNrWBpiv0GrxyACFJP6Vj3EzNSPr73mDMOARIMrldC1VwYrkzvHYarrwpvJwAFugArTa0bKYw0xWJHX0sjpVbD6J0RrhVSy0drpmZotNFQoL3bhFFGClHLuny0Qnmph3acqgpAsEqAR4qp_Iq40QJTuOIJqRzjWgS7EO2Z6X9MdUx1bhjvB-Ucb5mp7uOdqS7Hg5YXZOJTwHkh7oZ07BQu7iGPsPnM3RnR8xU9d5j4GEPAjHG7wxTTxXSHnun_UlWirdRDFMn6_YW3rTGsEvPqMPxOoj9xPK36CQAA__9uZofB) with a nearby Hawker Hunter Mk. 58 jet. Passengers [described the plunge as terrifying](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQRp8GOkf-xUnhYpt02XZLZPA4zK5hkD2Qzdtf5b7Cbb9POjo6fx7jI2LB7fk7rhA407jBqxVghjpyPdb9xIbcjn87tYZTgQpTHLXUTkgvtB9TxPIebZ9CBtBgegjKOzMo6ZXvl-CUMU4PV9BWTS45mydl9OTszWZv9NRj-NCk115J6ZS73K5SJ2Wm65ytBZCdlZCQqV7-Em68QC5vOqFeZlr7EhbmvXXmV6fvnb7vQHuBz9Xpe6ODlxc0Frngc2GRqc6QBG5MAv5zhRXEGjc4TqiCScSTMIkVk4hYxUylYEPahFLe3wYj-xrS_sLPPPjOyucasXx78I_inUF_BQAA__8EZoUR), with many thrown from their seats and screams echoing through the cabin. Two flight attendants were injured, but no passengers were hurt. The pilots responded to two traffic alerts by climbing and descending as a Hawker Hunter reportedly entered controlled airspace without clearance, though the Southwest crew had visual contact. The flight continued and landed safely in Las Vegas. Southwest said it’s cooperating with the Federal Aviation Administration for a full investigation.

On this day in 1861, was named commander of the U.S. Army of the Potomac, replacing Gen. Irvin McDowell. After a series of clashes with President Lincoln, he was removed from command in November 1862, following the Battle of Antietam. See why President Trump is floating for U.S. taxpayers in today’s Finance section. Who doesn’t love earning a few bucks—especially on gas and groceries? is a we’re excited about, and many of us at The Flyover have already downloaded the app. It’s free, easy to use, and the earnings add up fast. Definitely worth checking out. | Trump Visits Scotland for Trade Talks and Golf from July 25-29 for a mix of diplomatic meetings and personal business, including trade talks with EU, U.K., and Scottish leaders and events at his golf resorts in Turnberry and Aberdeen. Trump will meet with U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer in Aberdeen to discuss a potential trade agreement. European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen and Scottish First Minister John Swinney, with energy and tariffs expected to be on the agenda. Security measures include , and increased surveillance around Trump’s properties and meeting sites. Protests are underway in Edinburgh, Aberdeen, and Glasgow. Maxwell Names 100 in DOJ Talks Ghislaine Maxwell was during two days of interviews about her ties to Jeffrey Epstein, her lawyer confirmed. Speaking with Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche, Maxwell reportedly connected to Epstein’s criminal network. Her lawyer emphasized that the immunity only applies if she tells the truth and denied that any deal was requested in return. President Trump, asked about a potential pardon while in Scotland, said he “hadn’t thought about it” and distanced himself from the DOJ’s decision. Southwest Jet Drops to Avoid Collision A Southwest flight dropped 475 feet Friday, about six minutes after takeoff from Burbank, with a nearby Hawker Hunter Mk. 58 jet. Passengers , with many thrown from their seats and screams echoing through the cabin. Two flight attendants were injured, but no passengers were hurt. The pilots responded to two traffic alerts by climbing and descending as a Hawker Hunter reportedly entered controlled airspace without clearance, though the Southwest crew had visual contact. The flight continued and landed safely in Las Vegas. Southwest said it’s cooperating with the Federal Aviation Administration for a full investigation. | | | Are you turning healthy fruits into highly unhealthy fruits, without even realizing it? Fruit can be one of the healthiest things you can put into your body, but the majority of Americans are guilty of making this single mistake that can counteract all of the health benefits of fruit. Some fruits can help with occasional constipation, reduce bloating, and even help burn calories. Others can wreak havoc on your digestive system and energy levels. In this viral presentation, world-renowned heart surgeon Dr. Steven Gundry showcases the three fruits to stop eating today. **Good Morning!** On this day in 1943, a Category 2 hurricane struck the Houston-Galveston area with little warning. Dubbed the [Surprise Hurricane of 1943](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uxCAUhE9jd6zggRdTUKRxt2lTWhgeaxR2seB5f24fOVJOkO7TjDQzmq_LfHEpp_v1093Q0iuW-Y7PlpEI67zVQtgIa3O1HhCWHf031hk4DIxrBnoOLuX3rPpgFx6M6NEKPcizUNyofrXCDQFjCDAu3EQf0Xg_6lE7Gf2opO-TPcK4Bi0EF5KfMJ658EaC9CB11J3iGBKVeqIVCV-uxfwuD6wnX259tivR1jr50cHUweQWL-ThdDBtpdGfxB5uz8RoRdb2utXUkK17rcm7O7ISmTBKdjABDMoMB_XVhu2Zck7tfIy43lzKv530v6ceFn4CAAD__4FYfGY), it killed 19 people, injured hundreds more, and caused the worst damage in the region since the 1915 storm. ## Dallas Police Arrest 12 for Anti-Israel Protests
Dallas police say 12 people [were arrested](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQRb8GOiN7cOJQuHgNXV67JRrsAax1MLJnIdmvXxHtH2w3mtFcnXs-7sMdQwzr_B8fZPk5pWGlo0RipjxsOTEVplww53Pw4xe5T8oDSLgIaQSYwWOIr0HX3o7Sd6omq8ylvSotO10v1iuSGkfjkC4EUmkvtUS8uRt14Duogz3DpAGjlFStbGi6SuW6FloHrZlMpSX5wCk3vBDTE8sUX2mn3Lj0qKNdmLdStf8q6Cvoj-No3FjOFue9gv79UkF_riroF8L9JbYUgyOxZSq0OhLIonDaRGHMe1hnMeM3ijUd4leCCKvwGOM7qs7Wb0eIMZTryTc_MMQ3Dv9N4m7hJwAA__-du4l9) after allegedly becoming unruly as part of an anti-Israel protest that spilled over into a nearby building. The protest took place in Uptown Dallas around 5 p.m. on Friday, and after calling for backup, police arrested nine on charges of criminal trespass, two for interference with public duties, and one for interference, resisting, and assaulting a public servant. The same group organizing the protest later staged a sit-in protest at the jail where the detainees were placed. No [further arrests](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAYhJ8Gd7bgBwe7oLiGLtdeaf2GnwSFBAu4ONmnX3l332C7kUaamW_-nZczxhQfl794J9NeIS8P2mui1qgsW8mNaqNSsZRD-PU_uRuVBTiMPdc96MVjTO9Fdd6s3M-iIyP0KE9C8Vl1V-NwVVzrgIgOJUgxwehgIsJx0jJgF80RxjVoIbiQfKBw4sLNEqQDqYNmipOPLZehXanRC2tI7_ykMrh875K5trZVJv8wsAzsvu_DY3U-7IfNwB48DGzKDhMD6zElrP0PWn_BD-yf0bVc3v2G5dZ_ozKwcpqVUJqB7Yrx2x5TivV0zLncMaav9va7z54GPgMAAP__BLeBdA) were made.
## San Antonio Considering More Than $350 Million Toward Spurs Project
San Antonio [officials confirmed plans](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O2zAQhJ9G6tbgj2xaBYs07i5tSmFPXElEKJJY7tnW2wdK8gbXDT4MBh_m18f0gTHFvP7Enby8lzJlerVEIsRT5SLUhLgh8xnC5xfNv4kno8wVlAPjpoAxHdPQB_-pwqh78tpd7U0Pahz6zYdrcCYE5fQYlL4P1gw3vN-ds_cr6VH30Z9jyhmntdJWXWi5KT2P1tjZWLe4blAUohS-yEZCb2xLOsqT-DKXvU9-E6mtsz868-jMo2HGLCXHwlQLy6Xw-g_Dfw6tfnEDzAFkI5ijHIBMwIThACmQaS0SUQiEeG9QMlQutTQKZzEjvDYU2LBWyg0yvaUzj559qK-YUmy303ndMaa_ivK9Y5_e_AkAAP__DXKQwA) to contribute between $350 million and $500 million toward a $1.5 billion downtown arena project anchored by the Spurs, following nearly a year of discussions. The source of the funding, according to City Manager Erik Walsh, may come from leasing the property to the Spurs and others, or revenue generated from a special Tax Increment Reinvestment Zone (TIRZ). Multiple residents voiced opposition to the city's plans during the meeting and at a protest outside City Hall. City officials emphasized the numbers are not final and remain subject to change following community engagement sessions and an economic analysis. You can see a video of the testimonies [here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1u5TAMhE8jd3qgKf_EhYtt1GXbLQ1aovOEyJIh8cXJ7RfaK2w3xBBDfvPnfXunEEP6-E0nr_J95C3xXSOLcNmukoWrcKlUShN-f7H75LIh4Khh1jhvnkL82YbOrzv4pe947efRTP0Ay9A918G_Hc688QD7SDx5WgjQ4DgMDG5csAtrC4MZ576H3sCDjwl6txg0Ds18zGoA9kFyeciThb-pHvEnf3F5uHx2cX2KXFWZXwqtQnvf9-OzkjRToW00Cm3MjqJC204ptDA3PSm0lZKmJDmFrF1ONXguVZsR9AigzxBjyKk5UsL-kjZI1vV6lap9vpPkO2kqnEjTGby-XnsMTufryjW0dYW2K6u_7hZVp0bzcVKI_56X_6v8a8W_AQAA___PLJbX).
## List: Texas Hotel Restaurants Make Top 100
The guide to the [top 100 hotel restaurants](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2uozAQhuGrMd1E9tjEUFBsQ3e23RL5ZxysNTgyk8PJ3a_ILWw30kiv9Hx_vpYvl0veH7_dRhP_pLrsdB6FmKktz1aZDqZ2uNauI_oXhb_UFpTYg7SAdokul_diujh5GUfV0aRsr-_KyNF06-SDHxz6MWhjrTfkbR-1Td6aoVfWqi5PV0xatEpJpeWN0l2qMGrUAbVNVhhJMXNtN16J6ccdqbzrN7VbqFtXppX5eQj9S-AscD7P83Ym566nwNk1zqGQwPlyCZxLDa4InFN9Ndhr4xU-TVgrU4GL6V7N7XzA7jaK4La6P4DrE5SUkHfglSDU187tLXDGwUKMZhxNkjDIfgSDSsPgNYIckgyGhiCH2LUpPs9cSj7uF-mxuVw-Av6_3b8n_BcAAP__v4CV9w) in the U.S. has recognized nine Texas establishments, including four in North Texas. Data was collected and rankings were based on diner reviews, percentage of bookings made in advance, and five-star reviews. Stillwell’s and Fearing’s in Dallas, Trick Rider in Frisco, and 97 West Kitchen + Bar in Fort Worth all earned spots on the prestigious list. Austin was the most represented Texas city with three restaurants on the list: Dean's Italian Steakhouse, La Piscina, and The Peacock Mediterranean Grill. Dallas and San Antonio were close behind with two each. You can see the full list of the best hotel restaurants [here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SqzAMhZ8GOhhZxjgULm5Dl9tuyRgjgmcdzNhKSN5-x5l9g-2kb_Rzzvm6Tlfrg99v_-2dDL_WOO105kDMlKYjRabMlLJNqRTL_CD3TWlCQNWAblBPi_XhPXX1YmZYBlGTEVrJXnQwdPVmtBuGTkqE_rL2SikHq9CdVRen8AIz1d6UY6BRCwFCQktrD8INEqVDqVdddUCL55ha3ojpZfMa3vFJqXXxXgezMR-5kv8qHCscz_Ns40E72zlQmahwdBWOHI-meLCPZHfOv0QANFtkCp9lWdCnzXUyy3H6EHzui4Lb3frwech_i-lp8CcAAP__TkR76A).

The protest took place in Uptown Dallas around 5 p.m. on Friday, and after calling for backup, police arrested nine on charges of criminal trespass, two for interference with public duties, and one for interference, resisting, and assaulting a public servant. The same group organizing the protest later staged a sit-in protest at the jail where the detainees were placed. No were made. San Antonio Considering More Than $350 Million Toward Spurs Project San Antonio to contribute between $350 million and $500 million toward a $1.5 billion downtown arena project anchored by the Spurs, following nearly a year of discussions. The source of the funding, according to City Manager Erik Walsh, may come from leasing the property to the Spurs and others, or revenue generated from a special Tax Increment Reinvestment Zone (TIRZ). Multiple residents voiced opposition to the city's plans during the meeting and at a protest outside City Hall. City officials emphasized the numbers are not final and remain subject to change following community engagement sessions and an economic analysis. You can see a video of the testimonies . name: House GOP
subject: Cory Booker just proved again that he is America Last
body:
You’ll never believe what he said

| | | | |
---
Fellow conservative,

Senator Cory Booker took to X to post a video of **_illegal aliens_** , and said - point blank - "**_We will fight to protect you._** "

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aRoj/?__vbtrk=MzA1NDY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA1NDY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Clips from the video Cory Booker posted on X._

To Liberal elitists like Cory Booker the priority is cheap labor. They are determined to continue importing massive numbers of unvetted foreign workers no matter what the cost is to our economy and public safety.
Their priorities are backwards. American citizens are simply not their main concern.
Cory Booker is less concerned if his constituents lose their livelihoods and are unable to attain the American Dream due to the unemployment and lowering of wages that illegal immigration causes.
Cory Booker is less concerned if his constituents are** _raped_** or** _murdered_** by violent illegal migrant criminals.

**_[Cory Booker is less concerned with the prosperity and safety of you and your loved ones than he is with protecting illegal alien criminals in our country.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aRoj/?__vbtrk=MzA1NDY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA1NDY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aRoj/?__vbtrk=MzA1NDY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA1NDY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Cory Booker, by his own admission, is more interested in protecting the people who set innocent Americans on fire on public transit, than the Americans they victimize each and every day.
But rather than support the Rule of Law and encourage immigrants to apply for legal entry into our nation he is willing to risk horrific violence happening to our country from unvetted illegal aliens - something Cory Booker _knows_ has happened time and again.
**_[Friend, we are unwilling to take that risk and we are calling on support from patriots like you to make sure more lunatics like Cory Booker are not elected to power](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aRoj/?__vbtrk=MzA1NDY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA1NDY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

[MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aRoj/?__vbtrk=MzA1NDY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA1NDY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Patriot, we won a massive victory last year on a promise to restore our nation and put the needs of the American People FIRST. We can not allow Swamp creatures like Cory Booker who despise our country to undermine our agenda and must keep these America Last politicians as far away from power as possible.
That’s we we are rallying behind Elise Stefanik and the House GOP Battleground Fund.

**_[Chairwoman Elise Stefanik established the House GOP Battleground Fund for this fight to ensure we hold the line and elect America First leaders.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aRoj/?__vbtrk=MzA1NDY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA1NDY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**

Our team of conservative activists and campaign veterans are on the frontlines right now doing everything we can to fight back from deploying grassroots voter engagement efforts to launching ads and public information campaigns.

Our goal is to both expose Democrats like Cory Booker and provide the resources needed for conservatives to fight and win in the most hotly contested races in the country.

**_[With your help we can prevent America Last Democrats like Cory Booker from having a Congressional majority.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aRoj/?__vbtrk=MzA1NDY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA1NDY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**

**_[Please, if you can, chip in whatever contribution you can today to help us hold the line and elect leaders who will uphold the Rule of Law](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aRoj/?__vbtrk=MzA1NDY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA1NDY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
There is so much work to do to lay the groundwork for victory and we can’t allow ourselves to be overwhelmed by the resources of the Radical Left.
We are grateful for the continued support of Americans like you who remain committed to Make America Great Again.

_Your fellow patriots,_
**House GOP**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aRoj/?__vbtrk=MzA1NDY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA1NDY0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

Lyndon and Helga LaRouche visited Brazil June 11-15, 2002, invited by the City Council of São Paulo, where LaRouche was awarded honorary citizenship in that city of more than 18 million people, the third largest in the world. LaRouche gave three public addresses during his week-long visit, in addition to his speech to the City Council. In each, he warned that there was no solution to the current economic crisis within the existing international financial system. LaRouche insisted that there was no way the United States would come out of the breakdown crisis without the founding of a community of principle among the nations of the Americas, and that Brazil had a particular role to play in any such endeavor. With the formation and expansion of the BRICS nations, Brazil has clearly strived to fulfill the role that LaRouche prescribed in 2002. Will the United States follow suit? [**Watch here**](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFiFr_JGOr6UkPcaycd1P-pEALyLvkq4MqBATDojhsAr7&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250727_newsletter&n=4)

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Shapiro admin hides critical HR blunder
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2b8c5495a9&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Shapiro admin stonewalls on key HR policies in sexual harassment scandal](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cbf9f733bd&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_
Gov. Josh Shapiro’s administration is refusing to provide copies of the human resources policies that would support its central defense: that Shapiro was kept in the dark for months about sexual harassment allegations against a top aide with whom he had been personally close for years because those policies prevented him from being informed.

Additionally, new Right to Know documents obtained by this outlet show that within a week of the allegations first surfacing, both Shapiro’s chief of staff Dana Fritz and chief legal counsel Jennifer Selber knew of the allegations. That finding undercuts Shapiro’s public defense in which he specifically invoked these “two strong women” as trusted leaders the public could count on to handle sexual misconduct issues.

**Why It Matters**. Shapiro supposedly first knew of the allegations about the time the office was negotiating a settlement — that would be either July or August 2023. Yet Vereb didn’t leave until the last days of September, and the governor’s office has refused to answer the question why he was able to stay on for at least a month after Shapiro supposedly was informed. The same logic would apply equally to Fritz and Selber as well.

Shapiro’s spokesman didn’t refute the notion that the email showed Shapiro’s top-two women leaders were in the loop early on.

“It is the responsibility of the leadership of the Governor’s office to responsibly and legally adhere to personnel policies and procedures to ensure all complaints are fully investigated for legitimacy, employees and former employees’ rights and privacy are protected, and that everyone feels safe in their workplace,” Bonder said. “That is the standard our leadership followed in this instance and we stand by their decision making based on the circumstances of this case, which we unfortunately cannot share publicly due to our legal responsibility to protect the complainant’s privacy.”

Bonder then pointed the finger elsewhere.

“While others have leaked and shared that confidential information, we will not do so.”

**Quotable**. “This whole debacle has shown that no one bothered to protect her when she was an employee and had a legitimate, credible sexual harassment complaint against her direct supervisor. I didn’t realize protecting employees meant writing a check and making her sign a non-disclosure agreement.” – Rep. Abby Major **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5426407f76&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[McCormick promotes Pennsylvania in a most un-Pennsylvanian way](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=08422b41fd&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Guy Ciarrocchi_
It’s a tale of two outlooks. A tale of two different priorities. Of two different types of leaders.

Pennsylvania Senator Dave McCormick invited the President, much of his cabinet and almost 3 dozen of America’s top corporate executives from technology, energy, manufacturing, finance and workforce development to collaborate at his “Pennsylvania Energy & Innovation Summit.”

The focus: America — not China — must win the battle to develop and use artificial intelligence. And Pennsylvania should lead the way to this new economy, with more natural gas energy than Saudi Arabia has oil, technology hubs, nuclear, coal and hydro-powered plants, and countless universities and trade schools.

**Why It Matters**. Contrast this with Harrisburg. For the third time in three years, Pennsylvania doesn’t have a budget on time. For the third year in a row, Governor Shapiro is trying to spend more money than we have in revenue. For the third year in a row, he pushes “fixes” to allow him to spend more than we have: raise taxes, create new taxes and borrow from our savings.

The GOP-led State Senate is opposed to spending more than we have, raising taxes, and borrowing to fill Shapiro’s debt.

That’s the story of the last three years — and, frankly, for far too long.

**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=54ad39a357&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Jeff Hurvitz: The decline and fall of late night TV](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=923bfb49c3&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Michael Smerconish: Let independent voters vote](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=640433af6b&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Marc LeBlond: Shapiro’s JFK moment on school choice](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f505fd69e1&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Stephen Gambescia: Are our nonprofits being good innkeepers?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a4fc4bfb9b&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Don’t ban books — or flags](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a66151e2c1&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[John Rossi: My wife and baseball](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8308904b1c&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
The economy is strong, illegal border crossings are at near zero, and the One Big Beautiful passed. There is plenty for the Trump administration to crow about. But the news cycle is nonetheless dominated by the Epstein files. Part of that is the mainstream media being determined never to give President Trump credit for anything good, but some of the blame must fall on the administration for handling this affair so poorly. At the _Wall Street Journal_ this week the editors suggest just [coming clean and putting the whole thing to rest](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=77a57a183b&e=b7b3eddce2). “If Ms. Bondi and Mr. Patel are now telling the truth about the contents of the Epstein files, then what’s needed are officials who will take the responsibility—and then take the heat—for declining to publish documents that could hurt victims and ruin reputations without a criminal case.” It’s a sensitive matter – the files no doubt contain a mix of serious crimes and unproven allegations. Sort out what should and should not be public will require a series of difficult judgement calls, but that is what the President and his people were elected to do. It’s time to deliver — responsibly — on their campaign promise.
---

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | | | | | Good morning and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. Stay up to date on all of this and more when you get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Todd Shepherd Gov. Josh Shapiro’s administration is refusing to provide copies of the human resources policies that would support its central defense: that Shapiro was kept in the dark for months about sexual harassment allegations against a top aide with whom he had been personally close for years because those policies prevented him from being informed. Additionally, new Right to Know documents obtained by this outlet show that within a week of the allegations first surfacing, both Shapiro’s chief of staff Dana Fritz and chief legal counsel Jennifer Selber knew of the allegations. That finding undercuts Shapiro’s public defense in which he specifically invoked these “two strong women” as trusted leaders the public could count on to handle sexual misconduct issues. Why It Matters. Shapiro supposedly first knew of the allegations about the time the office was negotiating a settlement — that would be either July or August 2023. Yet Vereb didn’t leave until the last days of September, and the governor’s office has refused to answer the question why he was able to stay on for at least a month after Shapiro supposedly was informed. The same logic would apply equally to Fritz and Selber as well. Shapiro’s spokesman didn’t refute the notion that the email showed Shapiro’s top-two women leaders were in the loop early on. “It is the responsibility of the leadership of the Governor’s office to responsibly and legally adhere to personnel policies and procedures to ensure all complaints are fully investigated for legitimacy, employees and former employees’ rights and privacy are protected, and that everyone feels safe in their workplace,” Bonder said. “That is the standard our leadership followed in this instance and we stand by their decision making based on the circumstances of this case, which we unfortunately cannot share publicly due to our legal responsibility to protect the complainant’s privacy.” Bonder then pointed the finger elsewhere. “While others have leaked and shared that confidential information, we will not do so.” Quotable. “This whole debacle has shown that no one bothered to protect her when she was an employee and had a legitimate, credible sexual harassment complaint against her direct supervisor. I didn’t realize protecting employees meant writing a check and making her sign a non-disclosure agreement.” – Rep. Abby Major | | 2. By Guy Ciarrocchi It’s a tale of two outlooks. A tale of two different priorities. Of two different types of leaders. Pennsylvania Senator Dave McCormick invited the President, much of his cabinet and almost 3 dozen of America’s top corporate executives from technology, energy, manufacturing, finance and workforce development to collaborate at his “Pennsylvania Energy & Innovation Summit.” The focus: America — not China — must win the battle to develop and use artificial intelligence. And Pennsylvania should lead the way to this new economy, with more natural gas energy than Saudi Arabia has oil, technology hubs, nuclear, coal and hydro-powered plants, and countless universities and trade schools. Why It Matters. Contrast this with Harrisburg. For the third time in three years, Pennsylvania doesn’t have a budget on time. For the third year in a row, Governor Shapiro is trying to spend more money than we have in revenue. For the third year in a row, he pushes “fixes” to allow him to spend more than we have: raise taxes, create new taxes and borrow from our savings. The GOP-led State Senate is opposed to spending more than we have, raising taxes, and borrowing to fill Shapiro’s debt. That’s the story of the last three years — and, frankly, for far too long. | | 3\. Lightning Round | | 4\. What we're reading The economy is strong, illegal border crossings are at near zero, and the One Big Beautiful passed. There is plenty for the Trump administration to crow about. But the news cycle is nonetheless dominated by the Epstein files. Part of that is the mainstream media being determined never to give President Trump credit for anything good, but some of the blame must fall on the administration for handling this affair so poorly. At the Wall Street Journal this week the editors suggest just . “If Ms. Bondi and Mr. Patel are now telling the truth about the contents of the Epstein files, then what’s needed are officials who will take the responsibility—and then take the heat—for declining to publish documents that could hurt victims and ruin reputations without a criminal case.” It’s a sensitive matter – the files no doubt contain a mix of serious crimes and unproven allegations. Sort out what should and should not be public will require a series of difficult judgement calls, but that is what the President and his people were elected to do. It’s time to deliver — responsibly — on their campaign promise. | | | Broad + Liberty is funded by readers like you. name: Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher (ret)
subject: Little Caesar’s Hot-N-Ready
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52c7af92-cc60-4e12-abc5-996eb68a79a9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T88193d03-53c4-46be-af5e-aaa3b2262bde/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d5b2b75-9570-4919-a424-b6948eeff319/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) | Peter, Whenever someone asks me what the hardest part of being deployed to Afghanistan was, I tell them: _“Little Caesar’s Hot-N-Ready pizza.”_ I missed one of everything while I was deployed: One of every birthday, one of every holiday. Recitals and soccer games. I knew what I had signed up for, but I still missed my husband. I missed our five kids even more. After I finally returned home to Colorado, we were driving back from church one day when my husband, Chris, suggested we stop and get two of those $5 pizzas from Little Caesar’s. Sitting at our kitchen table, surrounded by the six most important people to me in the world, I couldn’t help but feel an immense sense of gratitude to finally all be together again, just enjoying a simple meal. _“Wow,”_ I told my husband. _“This was a great idea.”_ Grabbing another slice, he had no idea that what he said next nearly broke my heart: _“Yeah, we do this all the time.”_ Suddenly, I realized that there were all these little things – these new family traditions – that not only had I not been a part of, not only had I missed, but I had no idea existed. I had sacrificed so much more than I even knew. And it killed me. It still does. **I am running for Congress against Lauren Boebert because I know what sacrifice means. I know what service looks like. And Lauren Boebert doesn’t have a clue. She is not a patriot. She doesn’t understand our values, our struggles, or what it means to serve. And worst of all: She doesn’t care.** Adam Frisch only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. Together, we can write the final chapter in Lauren Boebert’s embarrassing political career – but I need your help now to do it. We need to raise another $10,000 before midnight tonight to defeat Lauren Boebert and take back the House for Democrats, but right now, we’re still very short.** If we are going to finally send Lauren Boebert packing and flip this seat blue, I am counting on grassroots donors like you to chip in now to my campaign:** [**Please, will you split a ****donation right now between my campaign and ****Blue Amp Action**** – whatever amount you can afford – to help me defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats? I am not taking money from corporate PACs, so no amount you can give is too small.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T71d6d76a-8b87-4d4f-ad39-3ec558a7d236/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) My father and grandfather both served in the Navy. I’ve always felt like service is in my blood. And it would the honor of a lifetime to serve the people of Colorado’s 4th congressional district in Washington. I am humbled beyond words to have your support on this journey. Thank you, Eileen Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher (Retired)
United States Navy _REAR ADMIRAL EILEEN LAUBACHER (RET) IS A FORMER MEMBER OF THE U.S. NAVY. USE OF HER MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE._
---
|

| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|

| | |
---
| | | | |

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
