---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20250727_laubacher_b1_f1_s1_c1_warmup_n-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf38b72ed-e675-43d2-aa33-681399308563/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC

disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
If every supporter reading this donated to support state Dems, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing Republicans in state legislatures across the map. | | |
---
| |
---|---

| 🫏 If you are a local Democrat, please continue reading.

State Democrats are facing competitive special elections over the next few months.

**We’re counting on grassroots supporters to help elect Democrats who can defeat the far-right MAGA agenda.** [ A $7 donation is all it takes to fuel our work → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDKJeVHT4NLPtW98T85btld93cnuUKAs7eaJuTza6ojIVpau3Ow0HZy7Lg0PiB83oeh4Z0J6SXB_LjDE0Jkq3a6wbO9CKO8F0znVyuLH_bhfo-aQIWpungzyUfAY67EEaNwULBJ2ZNbpuAXRFsaKXZD5KVQ3_fgpSTkb2FjhzBSDbfH-F5WqyHRr6tv3EHZfIgvM9xcCgvuuBU7EePSezVNEcbcbsy6DMqS2CAuL1mTQ0HNeEf4FCXu1XctEwATmZ_oMDKtTBMnl4bRx4n1y2wB84udvXcMqNQNuYyi5AC2eV5Ryu6FDz7sgNsuTVa_afFqdtipeGXns77UumNBR_h4gokmhqW-xPK-7xaIj_0WQ0QdXDlXueGwqS6_KGElrfzhacJJWifygPqa0PWApEJECu19Zjt9mLyXDebqWHeAMM/4ij/Mg-PiNxfRUe0PloMFGMgBg/h0/h001.FkZdW2Se4wKPkwrahl1QTfAYWlsnQVyiXZs2uRtjJ5Q)
---
If every supporter reading this donated $7 to support state Dems today, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing extremists in state legislatures across the map. 💪

But we know not everyone can pitch in right now, so we’re relying on our most dedicated supporters to make your first donation of the year to the DLCC.

name: Steve Scalise
subject: The honest to God truth...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Effective in less than two weeks, our Pro-Trump House Majority will go down to 219 seats.
- FROM THE DESK OF - Majority Leader Steve Scalise
* * *

Effective in less than two weeks, our Pro-Trump House Majority will go down to 219 seats. Don't forget: Our Majority is the FIRST LINE OF DEFENSE standing in the way of House Democrats having complete power to:

* Impeach President Trump
* Investigate Conservatives
* Stonewall the America First Agenda

There are three upcoming Special Elections THIS YEAR and one more on the horizon. Democrats are favored to win all of them. If Republicans fail to overperform here, we'll be closer than ever to surrendering control to the Democrats.
So here's what we need:
Our FIRST deadline since we missed our major FEC fundraising goal is only days away and we're pacing behind yet again. [We need to rally between 50,000 and 60,000 Conservative donors to get back on track before our House Majority shrinks. I hate to ask you like this but can you please help us out?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fc5b5c9e5c56401ab8848673863ed330&_e=VECiLkZ4ilWjR_SVET2-dzW9DYWAzNndpPI9_U4_2AuRN_ySVF0_uH7SrnhUrmsE-Yu3I6ispVhjfltcaNAonTMnHUq90C0T4Le-Ek07gqBF_9lVHZLkkdNfI_VdsqCtj23l6SrkUHo_otWPcmKOrVN_7WiivoT4pvCgoTjS0elA8Y3oEMFzpoI7sG9wG_Ft981pInzEzcUnRSOXCPzR1jYiITz6dojXFaWgoVymTAtYVMW2yScm_vMO-OYV_zurDlS_Wy9J1Uf4rQixUfoH-ndxfqyg8sylxRYab37BZvInAyrQxedzXWvjLotW8aNgR7H8Ojub8hgLjRtm16AsJgFVCV3Sv46XQKSPKO2YGYnvbw90qfUOkNzcpO8EPA5X-vQyt-OP-sgGcg-HOYSnGCanQmdunhfcr3XbWnKRfSNVy9qOGRgOUTb1HUvcMu-sw-QlP2J_e496axPXcK-6AxbI1e6pngozzmtZiosnnTD0dXsankfyYG0ew_k0d9ozsOgWdaRuBWPDoKJs_lzaYYhM1697d9HcfXrYvRZl6B_Emgt_9mOHSrgbHi1IfjoRU5HxZ8m01D-vGqZNxawBIpEHEuPTxDm1l6hkxbdZ3We5ultSXzkDY7XlEoxmwRY43f51jxp2954eF0K_Ykr_KCsro6OSc_caKRHE6eBG57r5JKfRnJop8GJuaD3vTH7g5JcwjTFrbhIaIuJLQxaoVNpG67BQhU_uWmVsRK5MfAs%3D)[SEND HELP HERE
](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fc5b5c9e5c56401ab8848673863ed330&_e=VECiLkZ4ilWjR_SVET2-dzW9DYWAzNndpPI9_U4_2AuRN_ySVF0_uH7SrnhUrmsE-Yu3I6ispVhjfltcaNAonTMnHUq90C0T4Le-Ek07gqBF_9lVHZLkkdNfI_VdsqCtj23l6SrkUHo_otWPcmKOrVN_7WiivoT4pvCgoTjS0elA8Y3oEMFzpoI7sG9wG_Ft981pInzEzcUnRSOXCPzR1jYiITz6dojXFaWgoVymTAtYVMW2yScm_vMO-OYV_zurDlS_Wy9J1Uf4rQixUfoH-hhZ9mtiutWlAjF81cKoV3SKKwzkajFG-p3cACOUDRHlNoiIXJRvRK_sFVieABTcERsZf9R0dcNv-8gcgu9ewtG_J4UmsEbpxqvXXS8J7x21xsbJJ9ABePolDEqJ7nRiZPpzwAQ6noReJlUOw_virj1CjOUketjNaYnCZhP0vyCCKcAXzNG-EG_Ts14FcLVORBzIu-5rUAt4ULJmK7dYT6RJVXVp-8trlhd9BlVbGhaswF1z3aWDVWElXMtf4xEi5efWos7qa8eDDra8Xq2R-xknYQwmANQQiF9b_2ZOSk9meJlPGfLBSaEMjfTwlmTHlhHGlm5yPvxN5ViMJZDx3Vip0ahHhE7sAFBnfb6CmfvGPLFxENobOcsk8st7Nb2dY1XY8bCJEkLjXGYIf-d7xDevD70HwVYz8L3SbHBW2ov4vx0SN1wMd6Ov2_xmm6ISHjIMOeDCDKJrnlNR8kb6MQI%3D)Our House Majority is already one of the smallest in a CENTURY. We're about to lose one more Conservative in our corner and the Democrats are favored to win ALL THREE upcoming Special Elections.
The odds were already stacked against us but now they just jolted in favor of the Democrats. I understand if you're sick and tired of folks like me asking you for money...
But here's the bottom line:
President Trump needs us to hold the line. Without our Conservative House Majority, his entire legislative agenda will be dead on arrival in the House, his allies will be investigated to no end, and he could face impeachment on DAY ONE of Democrat control.
I've been around long enough to say this with authority: The pressure is on like never before.
If we fail to defend the House, we might as well kiss America's Golden Age goodbye and brace ourselves for a torrent of Liberal Witch Hunts.
But if we can mobilize enough Conservatives, we'll have the resources to support our Special Election candidates, defy the odds, and keep the House in GOP control for all four years of Trump's term.

Just a few of our priorities in 2026 + beyond:

Peter — every day, Democrats are fighting to make our country better for EVERYONE... not just the billionaires + MAGA insiders supporting Donald Trump.
Here are just a few of Democrats’ priorities in 2026 + beyond:
🏥 **Affordable health care** — no matter your income or zip code
⚖️ **Reproductive freedom** — not government control over our bodies

💵 **An economy that works for everyone** — not just the ultra-wealthy
🗳️ **Free and fair elections** — because our democracy is on the line

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I truly feared for my life
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11590075/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvcmY5Rm5KWmdhVg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3Mjc/LbmNsS0trU29Maw/qP2hpZHM9bmNtcEJTYXdlY3dhenJscw/gaIYo1g/sen252ef609)
| | | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot - I need to tell you something personal - because it’s not just about me anymore.
**A former federal employee from Voice of America was just indicted after spending over a year making violent threats against me, my family, and my staff.**
_At one point, he told me directly:_
**_“We’re coming after you and your staff, and we are locked and loaded._****_We’re going to take you all out. You’re going to get one between the eyes.”_**
I have faced countless threats from extremist Democrats and radical activists before, but nothing like this...
This man terrorized me for 15 months. And now that he’s been arrested, we’ve learned **he had ties to federally funded agencies** and access to resources that made these threats even more chilling.
This is exactly how dangerous the rhetoric from the Left has become. For years, they’ve demonized conservatives, calling us “extremists,” and encouraging their allies to “make us pay...”
**_And now their words are becoming violent actions._**
As a rank-and-file member of Congress, **_[I don’t have the luxury of government security details](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)_.**
**_I pay for protection out of my own campaign funds or my personal savings._**
Democrats know that when they force me to drain my campaign funds paying for security, they make it easier to beat me at the ballot box.
**_[So I’m asking you for you to chip in whatever you can manage to help keep me safe and fighting for our country](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)_****.**
[CHIP IN](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Thank you. Truly.
_In Liberty,_
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
**_[P.S. Please don’t think for one second that these threats are going to stop me from fighting for you every single day. I’ve never been more committed to our mission](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)_****.**

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11590075/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3Mjc/LbmNsS0trU29Maw/qP2hpZHM9bmNtcEJTYXdlY3dhenJscw/gaIYo1g/sdq43266bc0)

body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206q2fii1m36icoz79mdf5hdeml7iahvafyvi5l4q3kd0oxz39jslba5qt5svk91p2it7p34brlg5yzw319&__stmp=t0286x&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0286x&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1rcqnov94lihlb6i8mjo94c7wjnt1n4xp4sbttqzxg2sss8yla5zl0scochlh0yyy8su1z37risodenmmfjneizzrmwyvs2qr300w54h9u6bt64sjjllt9ck0eyofy0srslkid625e&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0286x&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0286x&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0286x&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0286x&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1rcqnov94lihlb6i8mjo94c7wjnt1n4xp4sbttqzxg2sss8yla5zl0scochlh0yyy8su1z37risodenmmfjneizzrmwyvs2qr300w54h9u6bt64sjjllt9ck0eyofy0srslkid625e&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0286x&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0286x&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Josh Weil
subject: My Sunday starts with pancakes and ends like this>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Hey Friend,
This morning started like most in my house, me flipping pancakes while my two sons debated who would win in a battle: Ant-Man or Groot. (Still unresolved.)
By noon, I’ll be in a crowded diner speaking to voters about housing costs, veteran care, and why Florida deserves better.
This is what public service looks like. It’s not glamor. It’s not tweets. It’s people showing up.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4C4378763855526946652B512F53476D4B554E3049665A7979554C6B496A2B2F6766424E674F665A5A3264434D507737376B683565616F49454C5267466D2B61/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-27%20at%209.19.23%E2%80%AFAM.png]
And I’m proud to do it every day.
I am running for U.S. Senate because affordability has been out of our government’s vocabulary for too long. Because families are being ripped apart and billionaires bankroll tax cut after tax cut, while everyday Americans are left behind.
If that’s the kind of Senator you want, not one hiding behind PACs and press conferences , I could use your help. We have a goal to hit this week, and today is the last day to do it:
👉 Pitch in today and be part of something better; $15 is all it takes. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?refcode=NTLJUL23]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
Thanks for being part of this journey, I knew I could count on you.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.05.04%E2%80%AFAM.png]

According to this _CBS News_ article, the Texas Legislature is convening a special session to redraw their congressional map and – _you guessed it_ – to boost the Trump regime’s power.

In the lead up to this, Trump’s Justice Department sent a letter to Governor Abbott of Texas alleging that some of the districts were racially gerrymandered and created coalition districts or a voting district where multiple racial or ethnic minority groups combine to form a majority of the population.

_**What Trump’s regime meant was:**_ these three districts are controlled by Democrats in primarily racially diverse areas.

**This is just another example of how Trump is actively working to undermine the rights and freedoms of communities of color. **

If this were to go to court, it could end up at Texas’s State Supreme Court, which is controlled by nine GOP justices.

**This is a perfect example of why the PA’s Supreme Court retention elections in November are so important. Courts matter, and if we want to ensure our fairly drawn Congressional districts are safe from the powerful hands of Trump, we need to fight back. **
[**Will you rush $25 to support our mobilization work ahead of the _critical_ November elections? | | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

clean_body: | | | You need to see this: According to this CBS News article, the Texas Legislature is convening a special session to redraw their congressional map and – you guessed it – to boost the Trump regime’s power. In the lead up to this, Trump’s Justice Department sent a letter to Governor Abbott of Texas alleging that some of the districts were racially gerrymandered and created coalition districts or a voting district where multiple racial or ethnic minority groups combine to form a majority of the population. What Trump’s regime meant was: these three districts are controlled by Democrats in primarily racially diverse areas. This is just another example of how Trump is actively working to undermine the rights and freedoms of communities of color. If this were to go to court, it could end up at Texas’s State Supreme Court, which is controlled by nine GOP justices. This is a perfect example of why the PA’s Supreme Court retention elections in November are so important. Courts matter, and if we want to ensure our fairly drawn Congressional districts are safe from the powerful hands of Trump, we need to fight back. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Onward, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. subject: Bondi's Epstein Lies Exposed – We Deserve Better
body:
She vowed to release the client list and videos exposing the horrors, positioning herself as the avenger for victims. But, the unsigned DOJ memo she released tells a different story: no list, no conspiracy in Epstein's death, and victims left hanging – much like during her Florida AG days when Epstein roamed free.

Pam Bondi's Epstein promises have crumbled into lies, and as a journalist committed to unearthing the facts, I'm here to break it down for you with the kind of detail that equips you to spread the word and demand accountability.

This betrayal isn't isolated; it's part of a larger pattern that weakens our movement from within.

**If you're ready for real justice,[**chip in here**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/SBuSCN9Qesx3pFocOXhtww/N4m763zMpEIu4UbnM6IiOw9Q) to back my reporting.**

She vowed to release the client list and videos exposing the horrors, positioning herself as the avenger for victims.

But, the unsigned DOJ memo she released tells a different story: no list, no conspiracy in Epstein's death, and victims left hanging - much like during her Florida AG days when Epstein roamed free.

Sources reveal massive internal clashes, with figures like Dan Bongino considering walking away and possibly resigning in disgust.

This is dividing MAGA, creating hopelessness that the Deep State exploits to suppress our votes and empower radicals.

**Fight back with knowledge - [**donate now**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/SBuSCN9Qesx3pFocOXhtww/N4m763zMpEIu4UbnM6IiOw9Q) for more exclusive insights.**

We've achieved victories before; together, we can do it again.

Stay vigilant,
Laura Loomer

body:
| | | **I’m Donald Trump’s worst nightmare: a mom, social worker, and proud Latina immigrant running to defeat a MAGA Republican in the Virginia House of Delegates.

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6AZiP9v3nokxqBHgChgWd_NyIQqFHJzHkFyYT8TOCJ9o381cvpCpmhRvK3fgo4ALCm1z9mSVmwo6wMIrO9JQoYXrdb6l-qP9cM5U9-ihwZmQv4f9l3g0V1G2E6XxjBmw9w1EG7z9WonoVvvTFBJjiDS8qa3DqDX8i_PuqRtwu1rTb28wOdYj_qvTkRGrHLyOJSic6_EUNy2qrCSpkhI7a5M/4ij/QaX_iOuhT7OULIwfcRNEXA/h0/h001.N0Jout7oFUH_6-SxUpCnGoYani8hESUwVp2PFVCvPOo)
[Election Day is just 100 days from today, and it’s our next chance to deliver MAGA a big defeat. Over 5,000 donations are powering our grassroots campaign, and ALL EYES are on Virginia ... donate to GET OUT THE VOTE!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqV4L1yibpnnxAqS2wxuS2391adw55EaVet93JJXLwbcl4Y2X2ny7zvNHM4TiWSkviIJaAOQ35rowGbA46LLkp81sxp3blI4xCwMgaWwftfiSnnVLHrZPwxauYg4_sII8MpYuSiC8BLYKXNbHVyGPhs_tWOQV00_BLwfKvF1KrWnoro8z2puXi17gV6r3nEIO2-gVWvBzp8UVGAuDEBueol1xuUKzK-Q57ZFl3N3OuCPkGgFrNUV3I4c-VrPa6op2q9oidoea1DtB8Z1iH895Vj8/4ij/QaX_iOuhT7OULIwfcRNEXA/h1/h001._c740O0HQQ-LPKZsIIjv5NaoalmPG0QZMhKt1oUcqYg)**
* * *
Friend, we’re 100 days out from Virginia’s elections ... _so allow me to reintroduce myself._ I’m Elizabeth Guzman, running in a toss-up, red-to-blue race for the Virginia House of Delegates. I immigrated from Peru with $300 in my pocket, working three minimum-wage jobs at the same time as I finished my education, becoming a social worker and union leader. But when Donald Trump was elected President in 2017, my young American-born son asked me whether we should go back to Peru after Trump and MAGA Republicans disparaged Latinos like us. **After all our hard work achieving the American dream, I wasn’t going to let anyone tell my children that they didn’t belong here.** I unseated an entrenched Republican incumbent, becoming the first Latina immigrant elected to the Virginia House of Delegates in its 400-year history. I sponsored and co-sponsored laws that raised the minimum wage, gave teachers and firefighters the right to unionize, and kept abortion safe and legal in Virginia. **This “DLCC Spotlight” race is one of America’s marquee red-to-blue pickup opportunities.** In 2023, $4.1 million was spent in this district ... the 8th most expensive House of Delegates race EVER. [**We’re planning big digital, television, mail, and field campaigns to WIN, but it’s only possible if we massively increase our fundraising in these final 100 days. Please, pitch in $100, $50, $10, or whatever you can.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqdxB9B_-Pj2UssOlSG4Io0evX2PNn_AWmY41uED1Qod-cHbX4srZhtLXhbV-RGgdno5LiRMcP-eEfMKHp6PVxM180ysaNOlAmzPNEQn74GDbAYe9onLvmv4BEgLw48LRKE5Rmppba6n219A9EHND9pu-cb0IVLkGep356RFSLeCZOXTyv1P81X_1ST3stK0peMRqZnWUQkWzs7bHhi7fiaKyfZdaNMaGbW4bnJzd_5PWruSlZoWUCrWcA4qSW9HV1YW6Q6kvej5npTrHcOKvu94/4ij/QaX_iOuhT7OULIwfcRNEXA/h2/h001.LnV9Z16S23-NZaI84Hipi_1Z9cB-Haij52N2enLpN8E) ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | I’m Donald Trump’s worst nightmare: a mom, social worker, and proud Latina immigrant running to defeat a MAGA Republican in the Virginia House of Delegates. Friend, we’re 100 days out from Virginia’s elections ... so allow me to reintroduce myself. I’m Elizabeth Guzman, running in a toss-up, red-to-blue race for the Virginia House of Delegates. I immigrated from Peru with $300 in my pocket, working three minimum-wage jobs at the same time as I finished my education, becoming a social worker and union leader. But when Donald Trump was elected President in 2017, my young American-born son asked me whether we should go back to Peru after Trump and MAGA Republicans disparaged Latinos like us. After all our hard work achieving the American dream, I wasn’t going to let anyone tell my children that they didn’t belong here. I unseated an entrenched Republican incumbent, becoming the first Latina immigrant elected to the Virginia House of Delegates in its 400-year history. I sponsored and co-sponsored laws that raised the minimum wage, gave teachers and firefighters the right to unionize, and kept abortion safe and legal in Virginia. This “DLCC Spotlight” race is one of America’s marquee red-to-blue pickup opportunities. In 2023, $4.1 million was spent in this district ... the 8th most expensive House of Delegates race EVER. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Thanks for your support, Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23241%2E4449941%2E2R7mz_) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23241%2E4449941%2E2R7mz_) | | It is with a heavy heart that we email you today.

It has been 15 years since _Citizens United_ began its reign of terror on our democracy.

**[So, we’re RUSHING to raise $25,000 before 11:59 PM to see this Amendment through.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65023?t=3&akid=23241%2E4449941%2E2R7mz_)**

---
Friend, we’ve begged you to help us overturn _Citizens United_. We pleaded with you. And still...nothing.

In the past 36 hours, our donations for a campaign to pass Amy Klobuchar and Adam Schiff’s Constitutional Amendment to ban Dark Money have reached an abrupt halt.
**_We missed our strict goal. Donald Trump is LAUGHING at us._**
**But we just received great news** : The deadline has been extended until the END OF THE DAY – and all donations will be 2OO% MATCHED!!

**But the harsh reality is:** If we don’t fill our $19,523 gap by tonight, our dreams of ending Dark Money’s iron grip on our elections will be crushed.

And if our dreams are crushed, Trump’s Republicans will sweep the Midterm Elections next year!
[**So, we’re begging on our hands and knees. Will you rush a 2OO%-MATCHED donation before it’s too late ?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65023?t=5&akid=23241%2E4449941%2E2R7mz_)

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32985?t=1011&refcode=email-20250727_v&akid=9085%2E5885482%2E1rE2qO ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Andrew Cuomo just declared that if Zohran Mamdani becomes Mayor of New
York City, he’ll pack his bags and move to Florida. And Our Revolution is
going to hold him to it. :)

Florida' if Zohran Mamdani becomes mayor

It’s just the latest sign that the corrupt, corporate old guard sees
Mamdani as a threat. But as Cuomo launches yet another campaign against
Mamdani after losing badly once, Our Revolution is rapidly scaling up our
work to MAKE SURE Mamdani wins once again.

work to elect Zohran Mamdani and send Cuomo to Florida to retire from
politics once and for all?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

Cuomo’s political record is littered with scandal after scandal. As
governor, he made massive cuts to education and health care to protect his
Republican buddies and hand favors to his wealthy donors. He blocked
crucial criminal justice reforms. His career blew up with a massive sexual
harassment scandal, followed by ruthless legal harassment of his accusers.
All while raking in massive payouts from real estate moguls and other
corporate donors.

Then, despite a massive loss to Mamdani in the primary, he jumped BACK
into the race to run as an independent. And MILLIONS in billionaire
dollars followed.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32985?source=email-20250727&t=1060&akid=9085%2E5885482%2E1rE2qO ]Headline: Cuomo to fight on in mayor's race after bruising primary loss
to Mamdani

Now, Cuomo’s threatening to go to Florida if Mamdani wins. Let's hold him
to that promise!

A victory for Mamdani is a victory for working families, for immigrants,
for renters struggling under the weight of corporate landlords – a victory
for all of us who’ve had enough of business as usual.

Our Revolution is already mobilizing to help make sure Mamdani wins.
THOUSANDS of us have taken action, demanding the Democratic establishment
unite behind him. But as Cuomo and his cronies go all out to block our
movement, we have to rapidly scale up our work to show the grassroots
stands together.

happen. Donate now to fuel our work to mobilize the grassroots and get
Mamdani elected Mayor of NYC!

When we organize, we win.

name: Team Jay Jones
subject: just a few thousand votes, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:

name: The Democrats
subject: Only 100 Days:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
It’s crunch time.
---
Can you believe it, Derek? It’s crunch time. **We only have 100 days left until Election Day in Virginia and New Jersey.** 100 days to elect Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill as the governors of their states. 100 days to flip the governor’s mansion from red to blue and elect a Democratic trifecta that will check Trump’s power up and down the ballot in Virginia. 100 days to protect a governor’s seat and a Democratic trifecta in New Jersey. What we do right now will determine the outcome in races like these, and we have a lot of work left to do. Every dollar we receive can help register voters, train volunteers, and expand our work across the country. That’s why, in this critical moment, _your contribution matters more than ever before._ We can’t do this alone. **We need all hands on deck now to elect strong Democratic leaders who can stand up to Trump and Republicans.** [**Could you pitch in $3 today to help expand our organizing efforts in races like these and build grassroots resistance ahead of 2026?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250727_4035_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4035_22930333_PEU6Y2&akid=4035%2E22930333%2EPEU6Y2) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250727_4035_fr&refcode2=4035_22930333_PEU6Y2&akid=4035%2E22930333%2EPEU6Y2)**

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: I dare them to try and denaturalize and deport me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
"Denaturalize and Deport.” — Republican Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1738%2E791427%2E_58shq)

**[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&efcode=em250727-1-nor&t=2&akid=1738%2E791427%2E_58shq)
“Denaturalize and Deport.” — Republican Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier.
These guys are just pathetic.
MAGA has taken control of all three branches of government, and in six months we’ve seen violations of constitutional rights, the defunding of services that Americans rely on, and all kinds of human rights abuses by ICE.
But it’s not enough that they are forcefully carrying out their agenda — they’re willing to go full authoritarian to stop anyone from even criticizing them, too.
That’s why a fellow member of the House, a Senator, and now an Attorney General have all threatened me with deportation. They see that I’m leading the charge against their unpopular agenda, and they want to silence and intimidate me.
So, I have the same response for Mr. Uthmeier that I had for Rep. Gill:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&efcode=em250727-1-nor&t=3&akid=1738%2E791427%2E_58shq)
I dare them all to try and denaturalize and deport me. Because they’ll have to go through me and the millions of people in this movement who believe in the rule of law and are committed to protecting our democracy from fascists like Trump and his GOP allies.
Until then, it’s just big talk from small men.
**[Friend — Help me show that we will not back down in the face of the far-right and their extremist anti-immigrant, anti-democracy agenda. Make a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford today.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&efcode=em250727-1-nor&t=4&akid=1738%2E791427%2E_58shq)

| | | I'm fed up, y'all.

name: Power Generator 2500X
subject: Deadly Strike Coming To America's Power Grid.
body:
THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21676/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/43cdfbe86b5b50d9ebfc10bb1af689319f56ce4c)
---
| | |
---
_July 27th, 2025 at 06:24 PM UTC_
---
| | |
---
| | **FORMER CIA OFFICIAL WARNS:** **DEADLY STRIKE COMING TO AMERICA'S POWER GRID** _**Can you keep your family safe when the lights go out?**_
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21676/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/43cdfbe86b5b50d9ebfc10bb1af689319f56ce4c)
---
**Former CIA Director stunned listeners with a stern warning...** An attack on America's infrastructure would _"blackout the national grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse"._ In fact, attacks on just nine of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in coast-to-coast black-outs, plunging millions into darkness for up to 18 months. Terrifying. **OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21676/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/43cdfbe86b5b50d9ebfc10bb1af689319f56ce4c). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **FOX & FRIENDS FEATURES BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21676/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/43cdfbe86b5b50d9ebfc10bb1af689319f56ce4c)
---
Fox & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out of generators.**_ Then a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21676/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/43cdfbe86b5b50d9ebfc10bb1af689319f56ce4c) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21676/6374453/95f25026327426bc03950c4fcfa3477aaba0359c/43cdfbe86b5b50d9ebfc10bb1af689319f56ce4c)[**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21676/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/43cdfbe86b5b50d9ebfc10bb1af689319f56ce4c)
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21676/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/43cdfbe86b5b50d9ebfc10bb1af689319f56ce4c)
---
**YOUR LIFELINE: THE NEW & IMPROVED PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2500X** The Patriot Power Generator 2500X now has double the capacity, more power, and newly expandable than our previous best-selling model. With this NEW Patriot Power Generator 2500X... You get MORE power... You get FASTER recharging... And it can even power your FRIDGE! It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE. **Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas.** You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. And its portability is a huge advancement over chunky gas generators, or home-installed systems. You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2500X with you if you are forced out of your home. You'll have an ample supply of AC electricity available to power your fridge, freezer, or medical devices. Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios... and so much more. You can even use it to power an electric blanket to keep you warm. **NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY** The [**Patriot Power Generator 2500X**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21676/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/43cdfbe86b5b50d9ebfc10bb1af689319f56ce4c) is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,500 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. And it's so easy to use a child can use it. Unfold and set up the solar panel in the sunlight. Plug in the solar panel. Now plug in your electronic devices and enjoy free power from the sun! Amazingly, it takes just 90 minutes to fully charge via AC cord. It holds a charge for up to a year. **ORDER TODAY AND GET 15 FREE GIFTS WORTH $1,391.70!**
* FREE 100-Watt Solar Panel ($499.95 Value)
* FREE Roll & Go Generator Cart ($69.95 Value)
* FREE Patriot Power Cell CX ($29.95 Value)
* FREE LED Light String ($49.95 Value)
* FREE 25-Foot Solar Panel Cord ($49.95 Value)
* FREE Online Event With Expert ($149 Value)
* FREE Survival Digital Library ($19.95 Value)
* FREE Report: Top 7 Reasons Grid Will Fail
* FREE Report: Blackout Response Guide
* FREE Report: Generator Survival Checklist
* FREE Report: Solar Discount Secrets
* FREE $25 Gift Certificate
* FREE Lifetime Technical Support ($149 Value)
* FREE Private VIP Phone Line ($99 Value)
* FREE Shipping & Handling ($200 Value)
* FREE Senior & Military Discount ($50 Value)
* **Total Savings of $1,391.70!**

**_And YES! There's also an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!_** **PLEASE DON'T WAIT
TO LEARN MORE** But don't delay. We can't keep these generators in stock. Once we run out, it could be a while before we can get you one. [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21676/6374453/95f25026327426bc03950c4fcfa3477aaba0359c/43cdfbe86b5b50d9ebfc10bb1af689319f56ce4c)[**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21676/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/43cdfbe86b5b50d9ebfc10bb1af689319f56ce4c) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Customers Love Their
Patriot Power Generators!**
---
---
**Joe B.**
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" **Bob A.**
"Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" **Carla U.**
"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" **Bernice L.**
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" **Patricia T.**
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21676/6374453/95f25026327426bc03950c4fcfa3477aaba0359c/43cdfbe86b5b50d9ebfc10bb1af689319f56ce4c)[**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21676/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/43cdfbe86b5b50d9ebfc10bb1af689319f56ce4c)

name: Democrats Win Seats
subject: Peter, just three seats from flipping the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Win Seats PAC

Our mission at DWS PAC is to strategically direct resources to help elect Democrats around the country, and our success depends on support from thousands of donors across the country. name: Victory Mailings
subject: Peter Berkowitz on Socialism and Capitalism
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206q2griohlv65q3eg0j3c3y9dh5l4az7qs4jrn7k3u10rlbhxxa2hha7y473tf7pwpegopdqet43e4e4fx&__stmp=t02ayz&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t02ayz&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1rcryymr8iooyqbrghcokisr3htu1as64yktogogfg5vidii5thmc21anumrslpomv2av1va9x8pr10si0o2vsyqty3caq893ehlasbjw3el0i01t519nxyhiw0y1c6adr6z8ha19y&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t02ayz&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t02ayz&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t02ayz&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t02ayz&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1rcryymr8iooyqbrghcokisr3htu1as64yktogogfg5vidii5thmc21anumrslpomv2av1va9x8pr10si0o2vsyqty3caq893ehlasbjw3el0i01t519nxyhiw0y1c6adr6z8ha19y&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t02ayz&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t02ayz&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Paula Scanlan
subject: FWD: Stay Silent?
body:
| | |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m sure you’ve seen the recent showdown between Simone Biles and Riley Gaines – one bowing to the woke agenda and the other championing for little girls’ safety.
---
| | Watching governors and public officials deliberately subjecting girls to competing and changing with boys has been horrifying... ...and seeing fellow female athletes falling in line with it is even more infuriating. But if Simone Biles, the greatest female gymnast of all times, can be made to push the Trans lies...how much harder is it for young women isolated on liberal campuses to stand up for the truth?
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=79f4d5618f234a43a07b3da48be30c6f&_e=76W8TAjEgN3LtdmkbwFzbdm5EyicLkE3rDClyDsyTXluQRRZR0kDYZwv-EgbTL5oN77oq9k9FfXRZ6zO98x0dBzX961HOsf7X5Qaw56P8zIIDyHAuE3hduzHrfVSGFFvQmPmy7_oHbSpRfPjZuYmT-rBZoMIGpWWWRCOwZX4tmWdb80UjxwWXM2EX8-oB8bmrneSx3Sa2sURBcuThgixfKs9trnI-swgTMnGAzySC0e8FVFTR8nnXXnbdm97EToveOcwMEm9dCVOm910SnDoDQRFYdHQmC3gM88aDKoVERHCEFl0hQNk0une_yntL501TJ6iRevD9T2lflp8t4BME5MqYJYNpOf5Ta_9FYH9Tz1Wu1arBOWD0AtkT6mU8-6fCTjjLCCSr1lEZTYIyff130KxBkmufPvOwlEnwToW2ZV8TwslL0jMTQDFch3TlDPi-53p5TS9_IK_NpAbbIWUI2w1Kqu1-R3s7tlJdndP2MQwPs-Ude0h4STNOgwRLOmYmtRQ14sYm6OK5Trm7HllaMvtzP0kdmPeNDQ1wtaUurYjmReBYk65ViDcDKdJezu7h4kx8lMrFaU1x0xKLo32lAoIurmNxSQLaCt-IpAM_heny-hwESQMzRxKsIA1l3cE31QZjgzW4bzInzTNQjUsiUmdqSbRb67fN1PjsH3l-GIGtIOwcBghqI36TYZD4uFh9lUe01aGHEVUtild5d9k6u5VlorxeQZJiKxU27s1TCGimZzmORWFXsBtbNepqk4PUvtvvvKmwvElfs1u0vcPeMcEMgOTljhXg13DjE1YMZ2OiKtZWINExvSW4weWGzh51XI9XT37h-UhKR6rVH3vyo61-GMxgRau9nRy91xs978zu1dBjgJlgDNstluDnvigrjMhH813CkOms_vudwn3qo2rlH9Ut_ZHwdyX-0XbNnB05Ac9HV1j62TuXks7JiNNFEMVzzQDpTds22PWzNJkjir8TRNYfIZN8UuQk2DAdD-VACoHa7b9Sow9Eo7cW_xG-2RQI7X0LheIuPs2AdJ-9IMa53bw962C1jheWA297zs%3D)
---
| | Many are ostracized by the community, condemned as hateful bigots, while being verbally and physically harassed. 4 years ago, that was me, and it was terrifying. That’s why I’m proud to stand with the **Clare Boothe Luce Center for Conservative Women** as they are taking bold action to help and support young women on college campuses. Giving them the resources and ability to stand strong in their conservative values and unapologetically share the truth through:
---
* Hosting conservative speakers on campus
* National Student Summits
* Educational programs on firearms, public speaking, policies and more

---
But the Luce Center can’t do it alone. As a non-profit who refuses any federal funding, they rely solely on the generosity of patriots like you. You and I cannot allow the radical Left to steal another generation of women. Will you stay silent or join us in defending our young women? Sincerely, Paula Scanlan
---

And if you dare to object, you’re warned: **stay silent—or face the consequences.** That’s what happened to me. To earn my place on the University of Pennsylvania’s NCAA Division I swim team, I began training in elementary school—eventually swimming twice a day and logging up to 50,000 yards per week in high school. College recruiters praised my drive and discipline, telling me my work ethic would open doors far beyond the pool. So I was stunned when college administrators disregarded those same standards and instead celebrated my male teammate—who had ranked in the 400s and 500s nationally on the men’s team—as “brave” and “heroic” for switching to the women’s team, where he instantly became one of the top-ranked “female” swimmers in the country. When I voiced my concerns, administrators shut me down. They told me it was “non-negotiable” that this man would compete alongside me—and undress beside me in the women’s locker room. But when I saw Riley Gaines - a fellow female collegiate swimmer who competed and tied with “Lia” Thomas - speaking publicly about her experience, I knew I didn't have to be silent. That’s why the **Luce Center** prioritizes hosting National Student Summits giving young conservative women the chance to meet likeminded peers who will help strengthen each other as they battle against the radical ideology in today’s culture. **#3. They’re training young women to actively fight back against the Left’s harmful agenda. **
---
It isn’t enough for us to create barriers to keep the lies of the Left out. We must root out the radical ideology from our colleges, government institutions, and culture. Which is why the Luce Center offers Summer, Fall, and Spring internships for young women to strengthen them in their fundamental patriotic American values. As interns they receive expert led training in...
---
* Ignore biological truths plainly visible to your own eyes,
* Pretend it’s “fair” when men compete in women’s sports, and
* Welcome men into your locker rooms and other private spaces.

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m sure you’ve seen the recent showdown between Simone Biles and Riley Gaines – one bowing to the woke agenda and the other championing for little girls’ safety. | | Watching governors and public officials deliberately subjecting girls to competing and changing with boys has been horrifying... ...and seeing fellow female athletes falling in line with it is even more infuriating. But if Simone Biles, the greatest female gymnast of all times, can be made to push the Trans lies...how much harder is it for young women isolated on liberal campuses to stand up for the truth? | | | Many are ostracized by the community, condemned as hateful bigots, while being verbally and physically harassed. 4 years ago, that was me, and it was terrifying. That’s why I’m proud to stand with the Clare Boothe Luce Center for Conservative Women as they are taking bold action to help and support young women on college campuses. Giving them the resources and ability to stand strong in their conservative values and unapologetically share the truth through: Hosting conservative speakers on campus National Student Summits Educational programs on firearms, public speaking, policies and more But the Luce Center can’t do it alone. As a non-profit who refuses any federal funding, they rely solely on the generosity of patriots like you. You and I cannot allow the radical Left to steal another generation of women. Will you stay silent or join us in defending our young women? Sincerely, Paula Scanlan | | | | | P.S. Forwarded to you below is my FULL STORY of how I went from swimming D1 at UPenn with a man to standing up for conservative young women who are being silenced on campuses It’s personal. But I want you to know how patriots like YOU made this change possible... So please take a minute to read it over, as I’m so grateful for what patriots like you are doing to empower the next generation of conservative young women. \--begin forwarded message-- | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Please help me stop the radical Left from erasing true womanhood by submitting your right away. Your response is crucial because I was forced to undress every day in front of “Lia” (formerly Will) Thomas—a 6'4" male on the University of Pennsylvania women's swim team. And when I refused to quietly accept this violation of my privacy and dignity, college administrators told me I was the problem. Imagine being an 18-year-old girl stepping onto a college campus, eager to grow in wisdom, character, and strength. Instead, you're met with administrators, professors, and coaches who instruct you to: Ignore biological truths plainly visible to your own eyes, Pretend it’s “fair” when men compete in women’s sports, and Welcome men into your locker rooms and other private spaces. And if you dare to object, you’re warned: stay silent—or face the consequences. That’s what happened to me. To earn my place on the University of Pennsylvania’s NCAA Division I swim team, I began training in elementary school—eventually swimming twice a day and logging up to 50,000 yards per week in high school. College recruiters praised my drive and discipline, telling me my work ethic would open doors far beyond the pool. So I was stunned when college administrators disregarded those same standards and instead celebrated my male teammate—who had ranked in the 400s and 500s nationally on the men’s team—as “brave” and “heroic” for switching to the women’s team, where he instantly became one of the top-ranked “female” swimmers in the country. When I voiced my concerns, administrators shut me down. They told me it was “non-negotiable” that this man would compete alongside me—and undress beside me in the women’s locker room. They didn’t fix the injustice. They offered me “psychological services” to help me accept it. Then came their “advice”: “Be a team player. Don’t get canceled for being a bigot.” But I was raised to stand up for what is right, good, and true. How could I stay silent and support a lie—knowing that if I gave in, the next generation of young women would pay the price? Would you want your daughter, sister, or granddaughter to remain quiet in that moment? Or would you want her to have the courage to speak the truth? Unfortunately, the social pressure these Leftists are putting on young women is working all too often. In fact, over 60% of young women (ages 18-29) are not just silent when it comes to radical woke policies but publicly support them \-- the same policies that have degraded and harmed them by depriving them of their rights to safety, privacy, and equal opportunity. Leftists gloat that young women are a lost cause. Don’t believe it. That’s just another lie. Yes, many young women say they’re “liberal.” But under the surface liberalism you find when it comes to marriage, motherhood, finances, and crime , these same young women express strong, naturally conservative instincts —ones they’ve abandoned or hid out of fear of conflict. In other words: they’re not a lost cause. They’re just silenced and indoctrinated. But the time for sitting back while radicals reshape our young women, campuses, and culture is over. You and I must stand up—and make it clear: we will not be silenced. When I reflect on everything I experienced, I no longer wonder how this happened. It happened because too many people stayed silent. Too many leaders—people entrusted with protecting young women—chose cowardice over courage, conformity over truth. And beneath their failure lies something even more dangerous: a radical ideology that has taken root in our institutions. An ideology that tells girls truth and morality are relative. That faith and family are oppressive. That their worth depends on blind allegiance to the woke agenda— And that anyone who dares to dissent will be cast out, condemned, and forgotten. You and I know this is a lie. But tragically, many young women are falling for it. And that’s exactly why the Clare Boothe Luce Center for Conservative Women exists—to embolden these women, to equip them, and to show them they’re not alone. UPenn and the NCAA gave “Lia” Thomas a platform to push a harmful agenda. Now the Luce Center is giving women like Riley Gaines and me a platform to speak the truth. For more than 30 years, with support from patriots like you, the Luce Center has been reaching young women on college campuses to prepare and support them in standing up for their conservative values against the attacks of the radical Left. #1. They’re giving students a platform to share their beliefs. Guest lecturers on college campuses are overwhelmingly liberal. Studies have proven this anti-conservative bias, with both liberals and conservatives attesting to the fact. That’s why the Luce Center helps students host campus lectures featuring conservative guest speakers like Abby Johnson, Riley Gaines, Allie Beth Stuckey, Kristan Hawkins, Liz Wheeler, KT McFarland and myself. The Luce Center was the first organization to host Riley Gaine s and me as speakers to fight in defense of women’s sports and privacy. And in March, I gave a Luce Center campus lecture at the University of California, Berkeley. It was an incredible experience talking with young women about the importance of courageously speaking out for the truth despite the overwhelming pressure the culture uses to silence you. , you’re making sure young women can discuss and share their conservative values with other students on campus and overcome the blatant anti-conservative bias. #2. They’re fostering community and friendships. My time at UPenn left me feeling isolated and fearful to share my beliefs. But when I saw Riley Gaines - a fellow female collegiate swimmer who competed and tied with “Lia” Thomas - speaking publicly about her experience, I knew I didn't have to be silent. That’s why the Luce Center prioritizes hosting National Student Summits giving young conservative women the chance to meet likeminded peers who will help strengthen each other as they battle against the radical ideology in today’s culture. , you help foster friendships and community among young conservative women when they need it most. #3. They’re training young women to actively fight back against the Left’s harmful agenda. It isn’t enough for us to create barriers to keep the lies of the Left out. We must root out the radical ideology from our colleges, government institutions, and culture. Which is why the Luce Center offers Summer, Fall, and Spring internships for young women to strengthen them in their fundamental patriotic American values. As interns they receive expert led training in... Ignore biological truths plainly visible to your own eyes, Pretend it’s “fair” when men compete in women’s sports, and Welcome men into your locker rooms and other private spaces. you’re helping the Luce Center in equipping young women with the necessary skills, knowledge, and connections they need to be leaders on the front line in the fight against the radical Left. After hearing all the great work they do, I know you probably want to fund a National Student Summit or Campus Lecture on your own, Please give whatever you can, whether it's smaller or larger, because the Luce Center is up against the bottomless pockets of the radical Left and the woke universities. Now more than ever, we need conservatives willing to stand up and fight against the radical indoctrination of young women. And I've seen firsthand how the Luce Center has helped hundreds of young women across the country to do just that. They've done incredible work, but they can't do it alone. Please don't let us lose another generation of women to the Left! Thank you for taking the time to read my story and for joining me in supporting the young women of America. Sincerely,Paula Scanlan | | | | | P.S. The Left is stealing the hearts and minds of the young women across our country through manipulation and lies. I experienced their tactics firsthand when I was forced to undress every day in front of a 6'4'' man at UPenn. We need to stop the Left's attack and support conservative young women to stand strong in their beliefs. **We can't lose another generation of women to the Left. Thank you for your support! | | Clare Boothe Luce Center for Conservative Women, 112 Elden St., Suite P, Herndon, VA

For all those who have claimed that there is no "deep state" and that Trump is a "Russian puppet," perhaps for once in their shameless careers they should try taking a walk...

# [Russia Hoax: Why Obama and his lackeys are fork-tongued snakes](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=169374817&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5Mzc0ODE3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTM2MzA1NTQsImV4cCI6MTc1NjIyMjU1NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.X6Bs2CJUgXKeNbLJqrSzgZ1oIJG6AG1-Fjufspr1c0c)
### For all those who have claimed that there is no "deep state" and that Trump is a "Russian puppet," perhaps for once in their shameless careers they should try taking a walk...
| | [Richie McGinniss](https://substack.com/@richiemcginniss)
---
| Jul 27| | | ∙| | Guest post
---|---|---

---

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=169374817&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5Mzc0ODE3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MzYzMDU1NCwiZXhwIjoxNzU2MjIyNTU0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.28cMV9L-hRUPr3ixJnDMYRxWANODFfW9byCqLduLfE8&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/russia-hoax-why-obama-and-his-lackeys?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I heard gasps of surprise when Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard followed Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt into the packed briefing room on Thursday. The air expelling from the reporters' lungs seemed to express the death throes of the notion that Trump had come to power due to his corruption rather than the establishment's failure to provide for the people it claimed to serve.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ZoG7ouGBcWKzcIIeziWWkCLeltx1guAYUYbY_Vz-xFA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169374817)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7248084d-0d10-4114-b900-3f05a2d4e646?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The tension in the cramped space that once served as the White House swimming pool was palpable, having built up after nearly a decade of hysterical reporting about "Russian Collusion" known alternatively as "The Russian Hoax." It seemed fitting that the hard truth should manifest itself in a place that had once been where presidents past found respite through aquatic escape: All the old traditions of civility and impartial reporting had drained from the White House grounds along with the water in the pool.
DNI Gabbard had just released a trove of declassified documents indicating what many people--at least those who can see through the bullshit--already knew: Donald Trump did not collude with the Russian government to steal the 2016 election from Hillary Clinton, and the intelligence assessment after the election would have reflected that truth were it not for scurrilous meddling from Barack Obama and his spy bosses.
I know firsthand how real world events can be twisted and manipulated to serve a politically expedient narrative. I saw as much during the 2020 shooting in Kenosha and then the subsequent trial of Kyle Rittenhouse and when I was on the ground amidst the mob that stormed into the Capitol on January 6th. What I learned from those experiences is that it's important to go to the source material rather than take the word of some eggheads in a studio who get paid to tell people what they want to hear, and not the uncomfortable truth.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together with Bonner Private Wines](https://substack.com/redirect/0b72a8a6-829c-4143-9727-27f96f033ecf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
## **[Drink Wine That's NOT Made by Globalists](https://substack.com/redirect/0b72a8a6-829c-4143-9727-27f96f033ecf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0b72a8a6-829c-4143-9727-27f96f033ecf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Want to know what's really in that $12 bottle at the store?
* Chemical dyes
* Fake oak flavoring
* Grape concentrate

These mass-market wines are made in factories owned by global corporations.
What they don't want you drinking? Wine made in tiny batches by honest, hardworking families -- deep in the Andes, or tucked away in the hills of Tuscany.
**[That's what we source at the Bonner Private Wine Partnership.](https://substack.com/redirect/0b72a8a6-829c-4143-9727-27f96f033ecf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Every quarter, we ship 6 rare bottles -- from places so remote, most Americans will never even hear about them.
These wines aren't for sale in stores, and they'll never be featured on a celebrity's Instagram.
They're for people like you. Folks who still believe in hard work, tradition, and doing things the right way.
**[See What's Inside the Box - Join Now](https://substack.com/redirect/0b72a8a6-829c-4143-9727-27f96f033ecf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
You won't find these wines at Costco. And that's a good thing.
- Will Bonner
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/0b72a8a6-829c-4143-9727-27f96f033ecf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Piece continues)**
In this case the raw evidence was the classified documents that DNI Gabbard released, and the uncomfortable truth was that Donald Trump was elected, not because he was a Russian agent, but because the "Hope and Change" that Obama promised amounted to more bailouts for Wall Street and a perpetuation of the forever wars that he vowed to end in the Middle East. Unable to fathom the fact that Trump was elected largely due to his own failures, Obama and his lackeys sought to spin a narrative that Trump had actually won because he was colluding with Vlad Putin, and not because he had capitalized on the disillusionment that stemmed from Obama's failure to change anything that improved the lives of the average Americans he pledged to save.
Gabbard laid out a presentation of declassified evidence to address two main questions: did Russia want Trump to win the election, and did Trump collude with Russia to achieve that aim?
According to DNI Gabbard and the declassified documents her office recently released, the answer to both those questions is no.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ZoG7ouGBcWKzcIIeziWWkCLeltx1guAYUYbY_Vz-xFA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169374817)
Gabbard claimed that Obama and his intel officials knew these answers, yet sought to undermine then President-elect Trump anyway. "There is irrefutable evidence that details how President Obama and his national security team directed the creation of an intelligence community assessment that they knew was false. They knew it would promote this contrived narrative that Russia interfered in the 2016 election to help President Trump win, selling it to the American people as though it were true. It wasn't."
One of the key claims in this report stated, "One scant, unclear, and unverifiable fragment of a sentence from one of the substandard reports constitutes the only classified information cited to suggest Putin 'aspired' to help Trump win."
It goes on to identify the source of this claim that Putin wanted Trump to win: "[REDACTED] CIA operations officers declined to publish the report when it was acquired [REDACTED] in February 2016, considering it 'odd' and 'lacking authoritativeness.'"
While the unnamed CIA officers declined to publish the report in February--ten months ahead of Trump's 2016 win--the recently declassified document alleges that--a month after Trump's win--the shoddy intelligence was included in a "full review" published by the then-Director of the CIA, John Brennan. "It was only disseminated in December 2016, on DCIA's post-election 'full review' order to put out previously unpublished information, and experienced CIA officers said that it 'would not have met the threshold' for dissemination otherwise." The document also points to multiple more credible intelligence reports that conflicted with the assessment that Putin wanted Trump to win, yet were excluded from the findings of the Intelligence Community in 2016, "Putin told him [a close confidant] he did not care who won the election."
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ZoG7ouGBcWKzcIIeziWWkCLeltx1guAYUYbY_Vz-xFA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169374817)
Furthermore, a December 8 Presidential Daily Briefing set to be delivered to both President Barack Obama and President-Elect Trump stated that Russian meddling did not impact the vote counts of the election and had been withheld from delivery. Presumably this was at the direction of then-President Obama because the next day Obama held a secret briefing with his spy chiefs, after which DNI Clapper's assistant sent an email to intelligence leaders with the subject line "POTUS tasking on Russia Election Meddling," asking the top brass to generate a new "assessment per the President's request."
So one month after the election, the intel community assessed that Putin did NOT interfere with the US election with the goal of getting Trump to win and yet our country was put through a multi-year charade in which Obama, Clinton, Clapper, Comey, Brennan, and their brainless allies in the media claimed that there was evidence that Putin not only wanted Trump to win, but that Trump had also colluded with Putin to achieve this aim.
Moreover, the document claims that portions of the now-debunked "Steele dossier" were used in an effort to make the Trump "Russian Collusion" narrative stick. An Inspector General investigation found that the "Steele dossier" was used to gain secret FISA warrants for members of the Trump campaign and that FBI agents continued to pursue those warrants even after they knew the findings of the dossier were demonstrably false.
For all those who have claimed that there is no "deep state" and that Trump is a "Russian puppet," perhaps for once in their shameless careers they should try taking a walk. Doubtful that they will, I have good intelligence indicating that the longer they cling to these outdated lies, the less relevant they will become.
As for Obama and the spy bosses that were responsible for weaving this false narrative from whole cloth, they may not see jail time, but history will show that they are lying, forked-tongued snakes.
