name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump’s “lock him up” rhetoric has become real --
body:
Hi Peter — this is Adam Schiff. The Real Texas PAC said I could reach out with this urgent message:
Donald Trump just went on Truth Social and called for me to be prosecuted.
Why? Because I led his first impeachment. Because I’ve held him accountable. Because I haven’t stopped. And I never will. This is just Trump’s latest attempt at political retaliation against his perceived enemies.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=072725_3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=072725_3]
Over the years, Trump has called for me to be jailed for a variety of reasons, including accusing me of treason. And this latest baseless attempt at political retribution won’t stop me from holding him accountable — not by a long shot.
I’m not surprised that Trump is lashing out again. But even by his standards, this one’s weak. And as much as Trump may hope, this latest smear will not distract from his Epstein files problem.
Nevertheless, I need your help right now to respond: rush a split donation between me and The Real Texas PAC to help us fight back and keep holding Trump accountable. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=072725_3]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Adam Schiff and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=072725_3&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=072725_3&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=072725_3&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=072725_3&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=072725_3&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-takebacknc?refcode=072725_3&amount=25]
Trump doesn’t want to talk about skyrocketing prices, his tariff failures, the big ugly bill or why his rabid supporters are demanding answers over his refusal to release the Epstein files. So he goes back to the same tired playbook: Attack, distract, repeat.
But I won’t be intimidated. And I won’t stop doing my job – not now, not ever.
Instead of working to help families hit by extreme weather, rising costs, or his own healthcare cuts, Trump is using his platform to lash out at those who tell the truth.
He wants to silence his critics. But I refuse to back down – and with you in my corner, I never will.
Please, rush a split donation to help me and The Real Texas PAC fight back today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=072725_3]
Trump can lie and threaten me all he wants. I will never be deterred from fulfilling my duties as a U.S. Senator.
Thank you for standing with me,
Adam
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=072725_3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=072725_3]

1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States

Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/Pq6mZqR8vUu32u6MFdTiQw2?unsubscribedata=2MtQ4BxJO2Yqn%2BRZd0yNqNuCvbu9OXkwcvpApWI2VQq3o5mk8aBisfYaFUmclYn6iima%2BlTwCDTVZ7ofrxu6d%2BWklKNQkMqiBY9uSj0ijF4bVp92ie%2FYTOL5qGv6Mxh7H6GZwgIhddYGISRylQioaOfuW49CDC%2FBT9S8IjMpwsUl33jGKBqZacwKSeh68P9IfWTdJsrL770KYgcKp9HWddZq1wseElInqd7ZqxIXYMRmHSZiiy0ZjuYhHS%2F%2BqkDxU3mswKz6JGa8Re7RFzxy3ldS%2BTybON5DxL4KgN%2BwAK0v9DUNfJUETbtk6ELV7CN39LvaPALF%2BtIcgaLHVcqDcHmcT38iG7rC3FgMVZlrH3vlF8VcHlXLn8%2BueGIE4Sbd4JCrPaur4XN%2B4V2E2in6JgykWfJD%2FXKbnk5lffvPou4%3D .

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive $5 million ad buy attacking me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112241404/559870145/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250727_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODEzNGM0Zi0zYjZiLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PqWdxCjsWjtp9mmhKddD5VSmb-J5cKK8lo34EW9QbG0=&emci=5f5b5fdd-9868-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e8134c4f-3b6b-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=252045)

Hey folks, it’s Jon. This just in: A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive __**$5 million**__ ad buy attacking me. Here’s the truth: Local elections often fly under the radar. But they decide everything from school policies to housing, transit and public safety.
**These races shape our communities and our futures.** They shape the direction of our communities — and they’re too important to miss. Yet on average, less than 20% of voters cast their ballot in local elections.
That’s why Off the Sidelines is mobilizing everyone to engage and vote up and down the ballot — starting in our own neighborhoods.
So tell us:**👉 Are you planning to vote in your next local election?**
| [TAKE THE POLL](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112241417/559870187/-920220903?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2025.07.27_OTS-Local-Voting_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzJmM2NhMS0zYjZiLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dz9K2SdT0OviGdtQQlSwn_6MlnC-Qs6tiQB5N2qI2wU=&emci=5f57f6e1-1b68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=572f3ca1-3b6b-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7659029)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I truly feared for my life
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e10677155/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvQ2hrYkg2ZnV1Qw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA3Mjc/LbmNsOGFFdVd6ZQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNEWjZ1M3FndW1lbExscw/gaIatPw/s4nbc7b3146)
| | | | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
friend - I need to tell you something personal - because it’s not just about me anymore.
**A former federal employee from Voice of America was just indicted after spending over a year making violent threats against me, my family, and my staff.**
_At one point, he told me directly:_
**_“We’re coming after you and your staff, and we are locked and loaded._****_We’re going to take you all out. You’re going to get one between the eyes.”_**
I have faced countless threats from extremist Democrats and radical activists before, but nothing like this...
This man terrorized me for 15 months. And now that he’s been arrested, we’ve learned **he had ties to federally funded agencies** and access to resources that made these threats even more chilling.
This is exactly how dangerous the rhetoric from the Left has become. For years, they’ve demonized conservatives, calling us “extremists,” and encouraging their allies to “make us pay...”
**_And now their words are becoming violent actions._**
As a rank-and-file member of Congress, **_[I don’t have the luxury of government security details](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)_.**
**_I pay for protection out of my own campaign funds or my personal savings._**
Democrats know that when they force me to drain my campaign funds paying for security, they make it easier to beat me at the ballot box.
**_[So I’m asking you for you to chip in whatever you can manage to help keep me safe and fighting for our country](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)_****.**
[CHIP IN](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
Thank you. Truly.
_In Liberty,_
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
**_[P.S. Please don’t think for one second that these threats are going to stop me from fighting for you every single day. I’ve never been more committed to our mission](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)_****.**

### **_[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e10677155/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA3Mjc/LbmNsOGFFdVd6ZQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNEWjZ1M3FndW1lbExscw/gaIatPw/s3hf7d2611b)_**

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e10677155/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA3Mjc/LbmNsOGFFdVd6ZQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNEWjZ1M3FndW1lbExscw/gaIatPw/s3hf7d2611b)

You’re going to get one between the eyes.” I have faced countless threats from extremist Democrats and radical activists before, but nothing like this... This man terrorized me for 15 months. And now that he’s been arrested, we’ve learned he had ties to federally funded agencies and access to resources that made these threats even more chilling. This is exactly how dangerous the rhetoric from the Left has become. For years, they’ve demonized conservatives, calling us “extremists,” and encouraging their allies to “make us pay...” And now their words are becoming violent actions. As a rank-and-file member of Congress, . I pay for protection out of my own campaign funds or my personal savings. Democrats know that when they force me to drain my campaign funds paying for security, they make it easier to beat me at the ballot box. . Thank you. Truly. In Liberty, Marjorie Taylor Greene . _

name: Team Pappas
subject: Endorse Chris Pappas for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Chris would be honored to have your support.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=1660%2E582294%2EXeaA8F)
**Congressman Chris Pappas is running for US Senate.**
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/em_ms_cp_2025_welcome_endorse?source=em20250727-1660&akid=1660%2E582294%2EXeaA8F)
Chris is a proven champion who’s defended one of the “swingiest” districts in the country four times. He has taken on the big fights in Congress, and he’s never been afraid to hold Donald Trump, national Republicans, and self-dealing billionaires accountable.
[**Now he’s ready for the fight to keep this crucial New Hampshire Senate seat blue with your support. Will you add your name now to endorse Chris’s campaign for Senate?**](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/em_ms_cp_2025_welcome_endorse?source=em20250727-1660&akid=1660%2E582294%2EXeaA8F)
**[Endorse Chris »](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/em_ms_cp_2025_welcome_endorse?source=em20250727-1660&akid=1660%2E582294%2EXeaA8F)**
All eyes will be on New Hampshire – and this race in particular – in the next election. Why? Because national Republicans intend to do everything in their power to hold on to their Senate majority and to expand it in purple states like New Hampshire. That’s why they’ve been attacking Chris since even before we launched this campaign!
Endorsing Chris’s campaign is a powerful way to take a stand in the fight. Together we’re going to keep this Senate seat blue and help usher in a new Democratic Senate majority.
[**Please show your support: Sign on now to endorse Chris Pappas for Senate.**](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/em_ms_cp_2025_welcome_endorse?source=em20250727-1660&akid=1660%2E582294%2EXeaA8F)
**[Endorse Chris »](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/em_ms_cp_2025_welcome_endorse?source=em20250727-1660&akid=1660%2E582294%2EXeaA8F)**
Thank you,
Team Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**

clean_body: Chris would be honored to have your support. Congressman Chris Pappas is running for US Senate. Chris is a proven champion who’s defended one of the “swingiest” districts in the country four times. He has taken on the big fights in Congress, and he’s never been afraid to hold Donald Trump, national Republicans, and self-dealing billionaires accountable. All eyes will be on New Hampshire – and this race in particular – in the next election. Why? Because national Republicans intend to do everything in their power to hold on to their Senate majority and to expand it in purple states like New Hampshire. That’s why they’ve been attacking Chris since even before we launched this campaign! Endorsing Chris’s campaign is a powerful way to take a stand in the fight. Together we’re going to keep this Senate seat blue and help usher in a new Democratic Senate majority. Thank you, Team Pappas New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Potato time 🥔
body:
|
#
Hi there, Earlier today, I stopped by the Munger Potato Festival – a beloved Bay County tradition packed with demolition derbies, live music, and yes... _free potatoes._ It’s one of those events I genuinely look forward to – where families gather year after year, kids sprint through the Spud Run, and everyone’s out enjoying the summer weather and catching up. This year they even added a mechanical bull... _which I decided to skip._ 😊 Being at our community’s events is one of the best parts of serving our district. It’s a chance to connect face-to-face, hear what’s on people’s minds, and be a part of something that makes Mid-Michigan so special. **But I’ll be honest: running for re-election takes a lot more than showing up at a festival – especially in a district that’s already a GOP top target.** We’ve got ambitious goals in front of us – and I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you to help us continue reaching voters in every corner of this district to keep this seat blue. [**That’s why I’m asking: will you chip in $3 to keep this campaign moving forward? name: Phil Weiser
subject: the fights we’ve won against Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado
body:
So far, I’ve sued the federal government 30 times to block the President’s overreach, and I want to share a headline with you:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112241715/559871178/1239926708?refcode=email_072725_winning&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWI0ZDFhMy0zZDZiLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ph-x4nvYggCtaqeRX-NEloIQdGoX6ezhcyCdHR18rzc=&emci=7f4d759d-3d6b-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=09b4d1a3-3d6b-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=51844520) Friend, when I say I won’t hesitate to take action against President Trump to defend Colorado, I mean it. Not because I want to. It’s because I have to. **So far, I’ve sued the federal government 30 times to block the President’s overreach — _and we’re winning._** **COLORADO NEWSLINE: Colorado so far wins favorable rulings in most of its lawsuits opposing Trump policies** Each case — such as the one last week to stand up for education funding illegally being held back — is one where I closely look at the legal merits and whether Colorado is harmed. And in almost every case so far, we’ve acted as a check on the President's illegal abuses of executive power. These are big victories for Colorado — and for the rule of law. **[I want to tell you more about the actions we’ve taken to protect Coloradans’ rights and freedoms from federal overreach, but if you’re short on time, and you already support my work, then please chip in to my campaign for Governor and help me keep up the fight for you, your family, and all Coloradans →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112241716/559871179/1955520693?refcode=email_072725_winning&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWI0ZDFhMy0zZDZiLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ph-x4nvYggCtaqeRX-NEloIQdGoX6ezhcyCdHR18rzc=)** | | [Donate Monthly →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112241717/559871180/-1555140616?amounts=5,25,50,75,100,250,500&recurring=1&refcode=email_072725_winning&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWI0ZDFhMy0zZDZiLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ph-x4nvYggCtaqeRX-NEloIQdGoX6ezhcyCdHR18rzc=)

My office has been able to win because we carefully and thoughtfully assess the nature and impact of the Trump Administration’s actions. Our team is working harder than ever — and I am really proud of how people have stepped up to do this important work. In the months since Donald Trump’s return to office, we’ve constantly had to ask ourselves two questions:
**_“Does this action harm Colorado?”_** and, **_“Is this action illegal?”_**
And 30 times so far, both answers have been yes.
When Donald Trump attempted to override the Fourteenth Amendment and ban birthright citizenship — _on his first day in office_ — I took him to court and secured a preliminary injunction to block his illegal order. And though the U.S. Supreme Court moved to weaken nationwide injunctions, our lawsuit will ensure that this order remains blocked in Colorado.
We sued the Trump administration to stop the president from meddling in Colorado’s free and fair elections — and won another preliminary injunction to block that order as well.
We took on the federal government to seek relief for the millions of hardworking Coloradans who can’t afford the seesaw of economic turmoil from Trump’s frivolous tariffs — and the U.S. Court of International Trade ruled in our favor, declaring his abuse of Presidential tariff powers illegal.
**And those are just three of the many cases we’ve brought — _and won_ — against the Trump administration to defend Coloradans. [And I don’t ever plan on backing down from my relentless defense of Coloradans’ rights and freedoms, no matter what the White House throws our way. If you’re with me in the fight to defend Coloradans’ rights, chip into my campaign for Governor today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112241719/559871182/1955520693?refcode=email_072725_winning&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWI0ZDFhMy0zZDZiLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ph-x4nvYggCtaqeRX-NEloIQdGoX6ezhcyCdHR18rzc=)**

clean_body: So far, I’ve sued the federal government 30 times to block the President’s overreach, and I want to share a headline with you: Friend, when I say I won’t hesitate to take action against President Trump to defend Colorado, I mean it. Not because I want to. It’s because I have to. So far, I’ve sued the federal government 30 times to block the President’s overreach — and we’re winning. COLORADO NEWSLINE: Colorado so far wins favorable rulings in most of its lawsuits opposing Trump policies Each case — such as the one last week to stand up for education funding illegally being held back — is one where I closely look at the legal merits and whether Colorado is harmed. And in almost every case so far, we’ve acted as a check on the President's illegal abuses of executive power. These are big victories for Colorado — and for the rule of law. = | | = | = My office has been able to win because we carefully and thoughtfully assess the nature and impact of the Trump Administration’s actions. Our team is working harder than ever — and I am really proud of how people have stepped up to do this important work. In the months since Donald Trump’s return to office, we’ve constantly had to ask ourselves two questions: “Does this action harm Colorado?” and, “Is this action illegal?” And 30 times so far, both answers have been yes. When Donald Trump attempted to override the Fourteenth Amendment and ban birthright citizenship — on his first day in office — I took him to court and secured a preliminary injunction to block his illegal order. And though the U.S. Supreme Court moved to weaken nationwide injunctions, our lawsuit will ensure that this order remains blocked in Colorado. We sued the Trump administration to stop the president from meddling in Colorado’s free and fair elections — and won another preliminary injunction to block that order as well. We took on the federal government to seek relief for the millions of hardworking Coloradans who can’t afford the seesaw of economic turmoil from Trump’s frivolous tariffs — and the U.S. Court of International Trade ruled in our favor, declaring his abuse of Presidential tariff powers illegal. And those are just three of the many cases we’ve brought — and won — against the Trump administration to defend Coloradans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you for your support, Phil | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. name: Hoosiers for Haggard
subject: County Fair Season
body:
Mid-way through summer only means we are in county fair season!

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/68c9a1868f97/county-fair-season?e=72dace1453)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
|
# County Fair Season!
---
|
---
| The last few weeks have been full of travelling the district, trying different foods, and plenty of county fairs! In the last 3 weeks I have been able to go to 9 different fairs and meet with local communities and leaders. Thank you to County Chairs Jason Armold, Shannon Mattix, and Phil Clay for the warm welcomes at your county GOP booths! We also have some exciting news coming up in the coming weeks that I think many of you will like so stay tuned!
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | On top of a full few weeks of fairs, I had the chance to go to great events. The Tippecanoe County Republican Women put on an amazing banquet and congratulations again to Yadira Salazar for an outstanding story and being honored as their Tribute to Women Honoree!
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| Finally before I see you all again in August, I also wanted to shout out the Carroll County Republican Party for an outstanding picnic event. Anytime I can serve great tasting food, I am in!
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| Stay tuned and make sure to read our next email because I think many people will like what we have to **announce in the coming weeks** and I look forward to sharing that soon but in the meantime make sure to check out our social media!
---

name: Juan Ciscomani
subject: BIG wins for AZ06
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=2b8b0c4791&e=659fba240e)
---
|
# **BIG wins for AZ06**
There have been some BIG wins recently, and I’m proud to report that the work we’re doing in Washington is delivering real results for Arizona. Here’s what we have accomplished: **✂️ CUT $9.4 billion in wasteful spending** The House passed a major rescissions package—eliminating billions in federal outlays that never should’ve happened in the first place. **GONE:**
❌ Unchecked foreign aid
❌ Taxpayer handouts for NPR and PBS
❌ Bureaucratic slush funds collecting dust Arizonans work hard for every dollar they earn—and they expect their government to be just as responsible with taxpayer funds. I voted to make sure we deliver on that. **🇺🇸PASSED a defense bill that backs our troops and protects Arizona** The FY26 Defense Appropriations Bill passed—and it’s a big win for our service members and our security. **Here’s what’s in it:**
✅ A well-earned 3.8% pay raise for our troops
✅$13 billion to strengthen missile defense and space readiness
✅ $1.15 billion to combat drug trafficking—including fentanyl
✅ And a smart shift in command structure to improve how we protect the southern border As promised – I am working for YOU. I am proud to vote for investments in national security, support for military families, and to keep Arizona safe along our border. **🏆 The HALT Fentanyl Act is now law** I was proud to co-sponsor this bill — and thrilled to see it signed into law by President Trump this week. The HALT Fentanyl Act permanently classifies fentanyl-related substances as Schedule I drugs under the Controlled Substances Act, giving law enforcement the tools they need to crack down on the cartels bringing poison into our communities. This bill will save lives—and for border communities like ours, this is personal. **THANK YOU!** Because of your support, we’re heading into the 2026 cycle with incredible momentum. 💰 Last quarter, we outraised all 13 Democrat challengers combined
💰 We’ve built a $2 million war chest—and we’re just getting started That kind of early strength shows the people of AZ-06 are fired up, engaged, and ready to win again. I’m so **GRATEFUL** for your support and **PROUD** of what we’ve accomplished together.

There is more to come! Stay in touch and I hope to see you around the district soon.

Juan

_P.S. If you have not signed my petition for the 2026 ballot, can you take a minute and sign it now? We need to keep the House in 2026 and our Republican majority runs through AZ-06._ **Sign here: [ttps://go.azsos.gov/z84g](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=5965bddb7b&e=659fba240e "E-Qual Petition Page")** _THANK YOU! _

name: Rural Americans United
subject: Reminder: Is Compassion a Failed Narrative for Democrats
body:
Is Compassion a Lost Cause for Democrats? Dive into the Newsletter.
| | | | |
---
| What Is In This Newsletter?

* Is Compassion a Failed Narrative for Democrats
* 13,510 Newly Registered Voters Reached
* An Unsustainable Future: Why the Democratic Establishment Must Invest in New Leadership
* Medicaid Symposium Yakima July 30th.
* Expanding Our Advisory Board

---
| |
---
| Fox News has been the most-watched TV channel for 96 consecutive quarters.
Consistently holding the attention of the premium 24 to 55 year old viewer.
Source: [Adweek - First Quarter 2025 Cable News Ratings](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015qFRR-bvj8as3gzm4lsv2nWO4uSCcweZ6FDSVPndVbuoGGtabTL82vROO56J6B40qOSP-ohB_ruULLU9J5PfnuJvo6P9ZRKElmi0qNUI2YNppbGO16ZNb24LeDSNXLFcPbKJ2onROwa0oI2XCzlRata0_r3WHQEGo9FDXVAb9ScCHB4CFv-PTFIYpF5UMHyBmCfhHMBdd-Sgpf7cQirTpFKFY2Yvh7ND&c=MerevG9ICUsUgz3vcZZJFovLSL8PsPLDJBhLH9mKI-a3wHgHiBp1iw==&ch=CpSqlDb6zJNIXmdTWepD8bbbLHRFywaNFrm6Q7ZT7VHsWZdbKmJOGA==)
---
| |
---
| Why compassion is a failed narrative for Democrats
Firstly, please note that this writer is a supporter of Democratic values, which are not necessarily the bastion of Democrats. They are the foundation on which this great nation stands through good and bad times. They are indelible and inalienable. I am also not writing that compassion should be abandoned. Definitely not. What I am writing is that the narrative of compassion does not impact the voter base, especially the far right, as the Democrats expect. They have been pounding this drum of morality and compassion for so very long, and it continues to have a lesser and lesser effect on voter behavior.
---
| |
---
| Does this mean that we should also give up on compassion and outrage over the injustices that surround us? Absolutely not. But we must stop just listening and start hearing what registers with people.
We live in a country where the majority of people who voted did so for a felon, sexual molester, corrupt politician, corrupt businessperson, and textbook megalomaniac, and still they cry for more. In fact, the majority of Americans prefer an authoritarian government to a democracy. ([USNews](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015qFRR-bvj8as3gzm4lsv2nWO4uSCcweZ6FDSVPndVbuoGGtabTL82vROO56J6B40uhSbUx-Y1bG-mYyQHQxPVOO7nQhvr16qAUqCsy0IGqG26PfEYo99YSVM1lPwfjQpEqGZEgBqL7GlX9TA9e0oxwiFODMNmJeatnkSKfzFhLrd0EuofiDSxT8DS1KmloDwqAQcV5msp1YJmBXt0Jf_WCbRReqOM2n6k9By8MuHCUqlZRZifN0QOHHTrMOnmbGFYBB0zSACJurNTRExNJPTgKTT7tH5wdop0Ab6Z5_gO45XHxFFpKV5K8Q4KYYLAo4b&c=MerevG9ICUsUgz3vcZZJFovLSL8PsPLDJBhLH9mKI-a3wHgHiBp1iw==&ch=CpSqlDb6zJNIXmdTWepD8bbbLHRFywaNFrm6Q7ZT7VHsWZdbKmJOGA==))
Why is it that compassion and morality are no longer the emotional levers they once were? I do not know. We live in a world that is a constant bombardment of negative emotions, and it may be nothing more than a self protective defense mechanism. Or more likely, part of a much more complex environment of the evil that men do, the constant threat of violence, being led by a corrupt government, and fed a steady diet of lies. All of this could fall under the heading of surviving rather than thriving and may be driving a very "me right now" sense of protectionism. We also know that the far right has for decades been successful in vilifying the poor and underprivileged to the point that it is an accepted truth among several generations of voters.
---
| |
---
| Regardless, it is real, and we must learn to speak to it. Imagine how foreign the MAGA cries sound to you. That is how our voices sound to them. There is no room for dialogue when ideologies are so far apart.
What would our messaging sound like if we steered away from the heart on our sleeves emotional victim tone that is all too often the voice of Democrats, and started sounding like MAGA, but with our own message?
I did a test using ChatGPT and asked it to write a message using both Democratic and Republican tones and this is what it produced. Democratic: Seventeen million Americans are about to lose their health care. Working families, children, and seniors will be left with nothing. Call your representative now and demand they protect our health, not take it away.
Republican: Seventeen million more people on government health care? That is the plan the left is pushing. Higher taxes, longer wait times, and less freedom. Call your representative and tell them to stop this socialist takeover of your health care.
The Democrat's message is about others. The Republican message is very much about the individual. It is personal. Very personal. There are other contrasts, but this one specifically is important, because in the words of Kevin Sorbo, B actor who played Hercules and MAGA mouthpiece, "Is your freedom more important than my safety? I do not know you. My lunch is more important to me than you are."
Sad as it might be, appealing to one's sense of empathy for others is not working across a wide range of critical voters. Information is skewed, fear is high, and the instinct to protect oneself and family is much greater than empathy for others. This is not bad, because we know that when people feel safe, they open up more to others. It is our responsibility to make that happen. Even if it means that for right now, we must pander to a selfish narrative.
Instead of seventeen million strangers losing Medicaid, it might be about higher local taxes and greater threats of violence in their communities. It is not clear what will work, but we know what has been done. And when the most powerful man in the world can flaunt his corruption as a badge of honor, we know it is not working.
---
| |
---
| 13,510 New Voters. One Chance to Reach Them. This July, Rural Americans United connected with 13,510 newly registered voters--people who have never been part of the democratic conversation before.
These voters are the future of our democracy, but without immediate follow-up, they may be swept up in the fear and falsehoods of the far right.
We will not let that happen.
To fully engage and mobilize these voters before it is too late, we need to raise $75,000 now. Newly registered voters are the most vulnerable and the most promising demographic to reach.
Your donation today keeps our promise to these voters--and to all of us who believe in inclusion, truth, and democracy. Please give now. Every dollar counts.
---
| [Donate](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015qFRR-bvj8as3gzm4lsv2nWO4uSCcweZ6FDSVPndVbuoGGtabTL82mKPKtoHdd40arpVB4IWJcs1mzJmqxbyLDtzcuIVr61xUdEaRuce1OMSOzNopRN5STw0NbT_1_ztU81WOTAq7z31G7teGOtgzEv4C8pOKubX4zZntBT1Lqw=&c=MerevG9ICUsUgz3vcZZJFovLSL8PsPLDJBhLH9mKI-a3wHgHiBp1iw==&ch=CpSqlDb6zJNIXmdTWepD8bbbLHRFywaNFrm6Q7ZT7VHsWZdbKmJOGA==)
---
| |
---
---
| |
---
|
## Martha Wycoff flying the Rural Americans United flag.
---
| |
---
| Guest Editorial - Allison Murphy Dabler
It is long past time to normalize discussion of, and to put pressure on the DNC and our Democratic Party leadership over its status quo, establishment failures. It has become clear that it is crucial to critique the current Democrats and shed light on how they are hurting the very people they claim to serve by not investing in the younger generation of leaders, and stepping back when they are risking the welfare of this country.
Life expectancy in this country is 79 years of age. When the Big Billionaire Bailout bill was recently passed in the House, sending it to the president's desk, it passed by a 215-214 vote. However, three Democrats were missing. Rep Gerry Connolly (75), had just passed away from cancer the day before. In the few months before that, both representatives Sylvester Turner (70) and Raul Grijalva (77) had passed away and their positions had not yet been filled.
A report from Axios has found that more than half of House Democrats who are 75 and older plan to seek re-election next year, including Rep. Maxine Waters (86), Rep. John Garamendi (80), and Rep. Rosa DeLauro (82). This is an unsustainable and irresponsible model for Democratic success and the future of this country.
Last December, when the DNC was forced to choose who to chair the powerful Oversight Committee, they chose the then 74 year old afore-mentioned Connolly, who had announced his cancer diagnosis just weeks before, over 35 year old Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. Just this past June, the motivated and hard working David Hogg was pushed out of the DNC, potentially losing Democrats the energized and active youth needed to win elections in the first place.
I'm not one to be ageist, or even call for term limits, but something has to give here. If establishment Democrats refuse to prioritize the recruitment, mentorship, and support of the next generation of leadership, they risk losing the good faith assumption that they can be leaders that will do what is right for the American people, even if it means stepping back. "Leadership is about making others better as a result of your presence, and making sure that impact lasts in your absence." -- Sheryl Sandberg In Solidarity,
Allison Murphy Dabler has held key leadership roles in the Democratic Party, including chairing the Benton County Democrats and co-chairing the State Democratic Platform Committee. She has organized campaigns, boosted voter engagement, and helped build progressive infrastructure across the Tri Cities. In 2025, she was honored with the Norm and Shirley Miller Leadership Award for her service and impact.
---
| |
---
| Rural Americans United is proud to sponsor the upcoming forum:
"Medicaid Cuts Affect Us All"
in partnership with Between the Ridges: Alliance for the Common Good.
As threats to Medicaid put rural communities at risk, this event offers a vital space to hear from local experts and explore what we can do next.
Join us on Wednesday, July 30 in Yakima. Details in the flyers below.

---

| | |
---

| | | |

### This could be you!

Rural Americans United is looking to expand our Advisory Board by one strong addition. We are seeking someone who reflects the rich diversity of our communities and of Rural Americans United. Currently, we lack representation from Indigenous peoples of Washington State. If you know someone who would be a good fit or if you are interested yourself, please reach out.

Derek, We want to share a crazy fact about how the DNC’s work is funded. Then, we’re going to ask **[you to make your first contribution of 2025 to help fund our work to organize everywhere.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250727_4081_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4081_22930333_tLoI_s&akid=4081%2E22930333%2EtLoI_s)** Out of everyone who receives these emails, about 1% of recipients have made at least one contribution this year to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot.

Now here’s something even crazier: That small percentage of people actually account for the majority of contributions we rely on to fund the DNC’s work.

So when you see Democrats win special elections, hold town halls in all 50 states, and take Trump to court, it’s grassroots donors who are making that possible.

Today, we’re asking you to join them, Derek. **We have a big fundraising deadline coming up in a few days and we need to keep building the resources to support Democrats running up and down the ballot, all over the country.** **[We’re asking everyone who cares about the future of our country to chip in $3 — or any amount that’s meaningful to you — today. We’ll put your contribution to work holding Republicans accountable, organizing nationwide, and investing in every single Democratic state party:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250727_4081_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4081_22930333_tLoI_s&akid=4081%2E22930333%2EtLoI_s)**
